### 2026-06-13 - F31 -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő + RD 05 + WEB16: LIVE-VERIFIED via MCP (resolver Ôťô) + 2 gotchas ÔÇö Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő ÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç RESTART Fusion ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞž
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő said "ÓŞąÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó" Ôćĺ I drove Fusion directly via MCP. Results:
**1. CODE IS CORRECT (proven in Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's live session):** loaded the new CC_Auto from disk + ran the resolver on real masters:
- `SD0SUP-000000` Ôćĺ resolves **`SD0SUP-000000 Drawing` (.f2d, score 100)** Ôťô ÔÇö and correctly IGNORED 10+ other drawings in that 29-file folder (score-gate works).
- `BKDNC1-120002` (**the part Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő AND WEB16 both clicked**) Ôćĺ folder has **3 files, ALL `.f3d` (config models), ZERO `.f2d`** Ôćĺ resolver returns None Ôćĺ opens master. **So "Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞö .f2d" is NOT a bug ÔÇö that cabinet has no drawing to open.** Test with a part that HAS a drawing (any SD-family part).
**2. ROOT CAUSE why no reload loaded my code ÔÇö the Reload button was ALSO broken (not just StopÔćĺRun):** `_ReloadExecutedHandler` checked `'CC_Auto' in sys.modules`, but Fusion registers this add-in under a MANGLED name (`__main__C%3A%2FÔÇŽCC_Auto_py`) Ôćĺ the check ALWAYS missed Ôćĺ it re-ran the STALE module. Both StopÔćĺRun AND the Reload button were no-ops for shell edits. **FIXED `_MASTERS 8342332`** (reload now loads fresh from `__file__`). My earlier "use the Reload button" advice was wrong ÔÇö corrected here + in memory.
**3. Hot-patch attempt FAILED (so a restart is now required):** I tried to swap the live bridge via MCP (stop old server Ôćĺ re-register OPEN event Ôćĺ restart server on 8765). Server rebound 8765 fine, but the **custom-event handler won't fire when registered from an MCP exec context** (503 timeout, handler never pumps ÔÇö Fusion needs the add-in's normal startup to wire CustomEvents). This left the OPEN bridge DOWN until a clean reload.
**ACTION (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő):** **save your work, then fully RESTART Fusion once.** That loads the new code via the proper add-in lifecycle: `bde907f` (kind=drawing) + `8342332` (reload fix) + restores the bridge. Then click a "drawing outdated" chip on a part that HAS a drawing Ôćĺ its `.f2d` opens. (BKDNC1-120002 won't ÔÇö it has none.) After this restart, future CC_Auto.py shell edits reload on one Reload-button tap.
Both halves code-DONE: web `2373acf` (WEB16, live) + Fusion `bde907f`+`8342332` (loads on restart). -- F31

### 2026-06-13 - F31 -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő + RD 05: chip "drawing outdated" Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł clear ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç export ÔÇö BUG Ó╣âÓŞÖ CC_SimplePDF, FIXED (_MASTERS 7e4c8e5) + manifest ÓŞőÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞíÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž LIVE (web bad320d) ÔĆ▒ 00:20
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő export BKDNC1-120002 Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž (PDF 07:18 Ôťô auto-push 97c0d05 Ôťô drawing_urn Ôťô) Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣ł chip ÓŞäÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞç ÔÇö RD Ó╣ÇÓŞŐÓ╣çÓŞäÓŞĽÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞ¬ÓŞ▓ÓŞó publish-drawing skill:
**ROOT CAUSE:** `cc_manifest.register_drawing` (CC_SimplePDF path) **PRESERVE `last_drawn_version` Ó╣ÇÓŞ¬ÓŞíÓŞş Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞäÓŞó bump** (`prev.get('last_drawn_version', 0)`) Ôćĺ entry ÓŞäÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł drawn=3 / fusion=5 Ôćĺ Ó╣ÇÓŞžÓ╣çÓŞÜ (`_drawingOutdated`: fv>lv) ÓŞľÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ outdated ÓŞľÓŞ╣ÓŞüÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓŞĽÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞíÓŞ╣ÓŞą... Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞíÓŞ╣ÓŞąÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç = **1-click export Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁÓŞŚÓŞ▓ÓŞç clear chip Ó╣äÓŞöÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó** (Ó╣ÇÓŞëÓŞ×ÓŞ▓ÓŞ░ÓŞ¬ÓŞ▓ÓŞó CC_DrawingPDF/manifest_io ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł stamp ÓŞľÓŞ╣ÓŞü ÔÇö `update_part` set last_drawn=fusion_version ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž)
**FIX (7e4c8e5, TDD 19/19):** `register_drawing(..., drawn_version=)` Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł ÔÇö stamp `last_drawn_version` + ÓŞóÓŞü `fusion_version` ÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖÓŞĽÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞíÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞş scan ÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç; None/0=unknown Ôćĺ preserve Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí. `CC_SimplePDF.py` ÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ version ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü `ddoc.documentReferences` (= master version ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł drawing ÓŞşÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖ export ÔÇö field `version` confirmed live ÓŞÜÓŞÖ BKDNC1 = 5) Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞ¬Ó╣łÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓. **Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç reload/restart** ÔÇö SimplePDF Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ invoke:'script' (re-exec ÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü click) + importlib.reload(cc_manifest) Ó╣âÓŞÖÓŞĽÓŞ▒ÓŞž Ôćĺ ÓŞíÓŞÁÓŞťÓŞą click ÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣ëÓŞ▓

- **English + code Ó╣ÇÓŞŚÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞÖ** (ÓŞüÓŞÄ Flux-no-Thai); ÓŞëÓŞÜÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓ╣äÓŞŚÓŞóÓ╣ÇÓŞĽÓ╣çÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖÓŞúÓŞ╣ÓŞŤÓ╣éÓŞźÓŞąÓŞöÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞźÓŞ▓ÓŞü (ÓŞ¬ÓŞúÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓ╣âÓŞÖÓ╣üÓŞŐÓŞŚ). Ó╣äÓŞşÓŞäÓŞşÓŞÖ = inline SVG ÓŞžÓŞ▓ÓŞöÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓŞç (Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞ×ÓŞÂÓ╣łÓŞç Tabler ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞžÓ╣çÓŞÜ).

### 2026-06-14 - G2 (WEB16, app.js lane) -> RD 05 + e: BUGFIX ÔÇö bend "Relink" did nothing for mixed-case codes (1de099c, LIVE)
e (live): "ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł bend ÓŞüÓŞö Relink Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞźÓ╣çÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ" ÔÇö picking a PDF in the ­čöŚ Pick-PDF picker on the bend list didn't change the row.
ROOT CAUSE (systematic-debugging, reproduced end-to-end in preview): `setDrawingLink(code,target)` force-uppercased the target ÔÇö `t = target.trim().toUpperCase()` (app.js:2925, old). But manifest `auto_generated` keys are **case-SENSITIVE** and mixed-case codes exist ÔÇö the project-variant codes `C1H101-093I30-Ruth`, `C10002-000000-Ruth`, `FTI000-145095-Ruth` (exactly the "nearby" candidates the picker surfaces first in 02 Ruth). So the link stored `ÔÇŽ-RUTH`, which `_effectiveDrawingCode`Ôćĺ`pdfUrlForCode` (exact-match `auto[effective]`) could never resolve Ôćĺ `pdfUrlForCode` returned '' Ôćĺ the ­čĹü PDF never appeared Ôćĺ "Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞźÓ╣çÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ". All-UPPERCASE targets (the majority) worked, which is why it slipped through. The KEY side already preserved case (used `code` as-is); only the VALUE was mangled.
EVIDENCE (preview, kdAPI, firebase write stubbed = non-destructive): for the 3 real mixed-case codes `auto[key]`=truthy but `auto[key.toUpperCase()]`=falsy; full repro link XÔćĺ`FTI000-145095-Ruth` BEFORE fix Ôćĺ stored `FTI000-145095-RUTH`, `pdfUrlForCode(X)`='' (no change); AFTER fix Ôćĺ stored `FTI000-145095-Ruth`, `pdfUrlForCode(X)` resolves a PDF.
FIX (app.js:2923 setDrawingLink, 1 spot): store the **original-case** trimmed target; the self-link + 2-cycle guards now compare **case-insensitively** (a code is the same part regardless of case) ÔÇö so cycles are still rejected without mangling the stored value. Bonus: also fixes a latent guard hole (a mixed-case self-link used to slip past `t !== code`).
VERIFIED: repro flips falseÔćĺtrue; self-link + 2-cycle still rejected (both true); `node --check` clean; `node --test` 24/24; 0 console errors; Pages deploy 27488762459 success; live app.js carries the fix (curl Ôťô). No migration needed ÔÇö current live `drawing_links` had NO case-broken entries (checked); new relinks just work, and any future mixed-case pick resolves.
FYI: app.js touched Ôćĺ pull --rebase. pathspec app.js only (Drawings/ auto-commits + scratch files untouched).
**NEEDS:** nothing. -- G2 (WEB16)

### 2026-06-14 - G2 (WEB16) -> RD 05 + FUSION lane: HANDOFF (e direct order, NOT my web lane) ÔÇö CC_DrawingPDF "choose master" picker overflows screen + unsorted
e (screenshot, direct to WEB16): the `CC_DrawingPDF ÔÇö choose master` dialog listed **94+ open designs**, unsorted, taller than the screen Ôćĺ the inputBox text field + OK button are OFF the bottom Ôćĺ "Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞüÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞĽÓ╣çÓŞíÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣ëÓŞ▓Ó╣äÓŞŤÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö Ó╣üÓŞąÓŞ░Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞúÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞçÓŞĽÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞĽÓŞ▒ÓŞžÓŞşÓŞ▒ÓŞüÓŞęÓŞú". This is `_MASTERS/fusion_scripts/CC_DrawingPDF/CC_DrawingPDF.py` = **FUSION lane** ÔÇö WEB16 (app.js/style.css) is NOT touching it (clobber rule + _MASTERS is local-only git). Logging the precise fix for whoever owns Fusion next.
INTERIM I gave e (works with the dialog open NOW): the inputBox text field has focus + prefilled "1", so **type the number then press Enter** (no need to see the OK button); **Esc** = cancel. If the target's number is below the screen, Esc Ôćĺ close the unrelated master tabs Ôćĺ re-run (fewer candidates).
ROOT (read-only, I inspected): `_pick_master(ui, candidates, drawing_name)` @ CC_DrawingPDF.py:135 ÔÇö `names` built in DOCUMENT-OPEN order (L139, unsorted); when fuzzy auto-match (L143-148) misses, it dumps ALL N into one `ui.inputBox` (L149-154) Ôćĺ overflow for big N. Same shape in `_pick_drawing` @ L114-123.
FIX SPEC (Fusion lane):
1. **Sort AÔćĺZ** keeping the indexÔćĺcandidate map correct, e.g. `pairs = sorted(zip(names, candidates), key=lambda p: p[0].lower())` then enumerate `pairs`; map typed number back to `pairs[idx][1]` (NOT the original `candidates[idx]` ÔÇö that's the bug-trap if you sort names only).
2. **No-overflow picker** (the real fix): replace the giant inputBox with a SCROLLABLE widget ÔÇö a transient command dialog with a `dropDownCommandInput` (TextListDropDownStyle) of the sorted names, or reuse the CC_Auto palette pattern. inputBox can't scroll, so any long list overflows regardless of sorting.
3. **Shrink the list** (strong win): pre-filter `candidates` to designs that actually have a CONFIG TABLE / real rows (real masters) ÔÇö 94 open tabs but few are masters; this often makes it auto-resolve. At minimum push fuzzy name-matches to `drawing_name` to the top.
VERIFY (Fusion lane, live): open 2+ masters + a drawing whose master doesn't auto-match Ôćĺ picker shows sorted, scrolls, picks correctly; py_compile OK. -- G2 (WEB16)
**NEEDS:** FUSION session to own this (paste-ready startup prompt handed to e in chat per [[feedback_fresh_session_prompt]]).

### 2026-06-14 - G1 (FUSION lane) -> e + WEB16: DONE ÔÇö CC_DrawingPDF master/drawing picker fixed (sorted + filtered + no-overflow)
Per e direct order (handoff from WEB16 @ 4793). `_MASTERS/fusion_scripts/CC_DrawingPDF/CC_DrawingPDF.py` ONLY (offline edit; did NOT open any cloud doc).
Fixed `_pick_master` (L135) + `_pick_drawing` (L114). Three changes:
1. **Sorted AÔćĺZ, correct index map** ÔÇö names+candidates kept paired via `sorted(zip(names, items))`; the typed number indexes the SAME sorted pair (no more name-sort-but-index-of-open-order bug).
2. **Filter to real masters** ÔÇö new `_is_real_master(design)` keeps only designs with a config table + Ôëą1 non-template row (reuses `_list_real_rows`). The 90+ open docs (mostly single parts) collapse to the few actual parametric masters; if a real master is the lone name-match it auto-picks with NO dialog. Falls back to all if none qualify.
3. **Overflow-safe picker** ÔÇö new `_pick_from_list(ui, title, header, pairs)`: inputBox capped at CAP=25 lines (field+OK always on screen) with live substring **filter** (type any text to narrow, a number to pick). near-drawing-name matches float to the top. Stays synchronous (no command-dialog async refactor of the export flow).
VERIFIED offline (real module import + mock ui): sort+index pick correct, 40-item list capped + filterÔćĺpick correct, _pick_master auto-picks the single real master without a dialog. py_compile clean.
NEEDS from e: **Reload (Reload CC_Auto / restart)** then live-verify ÔÇö open 2+ masters + a drawing whose master doesn't auto-match Ôćĺ picker shows sorted + filterable + OK reachable + picks the right master. -- G1

### 2026-06-14 - G2 (WEB16) -> RD 05 + e + ÔÜá ALL WEB sessions: PRECEDENCE REVERSED ÔÇö explicit Relink now WINS over a part's own drawing (bc4eada, LIVE)
e (screenshot, bend list, ­čöŚ highlighted): "ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣üÓŞüÓ╣ëÓ╣äÓŞéÓ╣ÇÓŞúÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞç relink Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞťÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó". My earlier case fix (1de099c) was a real but DIFFERENT bug ÔÇö these codes (BTHL00-140100/170100) are all-UPPERCASE so case never affected them. systematic-debugging Ôćĺ the REAL root cause:
ROOT: those parts are **config rows of master BTHL00** Ôćĺ they HAVE a native drawing (the shared `BTHL00-000000.pdf` representative page). The 2026-06-12 rule "native wins over link" (9d8adcd, `_effectiveDrawingCode` checked `auto[code]` FIRST) made the eye keep the native and **ignore e's relink** (140100Ôćĺ140025 was stored fine, just never shown) Ôćĺ "relink Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣üÓŞüÓ╣ë". e's relink was saved correctly; precedence ate it.
DECISION (asked e ÔÇö her 2 prefs conflicted): **"Relink ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞüÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓŞç ÓŞŐÓŞÖÓŞ░"** Ôćĺ explicit admin link now wins over native. This intentionally REVERSES 9d8adcd for explicitly-linked codes.
FIX (`_effectiveDrawingCode` app.js:530): check the explicit `drawing_links` link BEFORE native; the link wins **only if it resolves to a real drawing** (native OR uploaded) ÔÇö a stale/dead-end link falls back to the code's own drawing so the eye never blanks. Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: "Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ 070Ôćĺ085 ÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞüÓ╣üÓŞľÓŞž + ÓŞäÓŞžÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞüÓŞžÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç XÔćĺ850" Ó╣üÓŞąÓŞ░ "Ó╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ tool Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí ÓŞşÓŞóÓ╣łÓŞ▓Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ë card Ó╣ÇÓŞóÓŞşÓŞ░ ÓŞĽÓŞ▒ÓŞžÓ╣äÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣âÓŞüÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞüÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ + ÓŞŚÓŞ│ icon Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł". Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞü **CC_TierShift** (semantic = "Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ WWW tier" + ÓŞíÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ rename 070Ôćĺ085 ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž; FillWidths = ÓŞ¬ÓŞúÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓ╣üÓŞľÓŞžÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł ÓŞäÓŞÖÓŞąÓŞ░ÓŞçÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ).
WHAT (`CC_TierShift_action.py`): ÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞ×Ó╣î **'w' ÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞŚÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞó target** (Ó╣ÇÓŞŐÓ╣łÓŞÖ `085w`) Ôćĺ Ó╣éÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö **RE-WIDTH in-place**: ÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü row ÓŞŐÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞş `-070xxx` Ôćĺ ÓŞĽÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç **X param = target├Ś10 mm** (850) + rename WWW 070Ôćĺ085. **Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł Save-As, Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣üÓŞĽÓŞ░ cell/suppress ÓŞşÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞÖ**. Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁ 'w' = ÓŞ×ÓŞĄÓŞĽÓŞ┤ÓŞüÓŞúÓŞúÓŞí tier-shift Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí (refs/Save-As) Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ.
HOW: ÓŞčÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓŞüÓ╣îÓŞŐÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł `_set_width_params` reuse config API ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞ¬ÓŞ╣ÓŞłÓŞÖÓ╣îÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓ╣âÓŞÖ CC_FillWidths (`row.getCellByColumnIndex` + `ParameterCell.expression`); ÓŞźÓŞ▓ X column ÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó title 'X' (log ÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü column title ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞłÓŞş Ôćĺ degrade graceful, rename ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞ│). prompt parse 'w' + Ó╣ÇÓŞäÓŞąÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞúÓ╣îÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ regex (ÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ `085w` Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł match). force in-place+single Ó╣ÇÓŞíÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞş 'w'. confirm dialog Ó╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣îÓ╣üÓŞťÓŞÖ (XÔćĺ850 + rename) ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖÓ╣üÓŞüÓ╣ë.
ICON Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł: bar Ó╣üÓŞäÓŞÜÔćĺbar ÓŞüÓŞžÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞç(amber) + ÓŞąÓŞ╣ÓŞüÓŞĘÓŞú Ôćö = "shift tier + set width" (palette steel/ink/amber).
VERIFY: py_compile Ôťô; tuple/flag wiring grep Ôťô (4-tuple ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜ); icon render ÓŞöÓŞ╣Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞşÓŞşÓŞü Ôťô; API ÓŞóÓŞĚÓŞÖÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü FillWidths (top table = cfg, kind='top'). live = Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ (ÓŞíÓŞÁ Yes/No confirm ÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞ×ÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞö). _MASTERS local Ôćĺ fb3e796.
**RELOAD:** logic 'w' = ÓŞíÓŞÁÓŞťÓŞąÓŞäÓŞąÓŞ┤ÓŞüÓŞľÓŞ▒ÓŞöÓ╣äÓŞŤ (action reload by-mtime, Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç restart). **ICON = ÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç StopÔćĺRun add-in CC_TierShift** (ÓŞźÓŞúÓŞĚÓŞş restart Fusion) Ó╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞş re-register ÓŞŤÓŞŞÓ╣łÓŞí.
**ÔÜá G34:** ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç save ÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ë/assembly ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞşÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞç config ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ X ÓŞşÓŞ▓ÓŞłÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç getLatestVersion+reactivate Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ë geometry ÓŞşÓŞ▒ÓŞŤÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞĽ.
**NEEDS:** nothing. (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞö 2UP master Ôćĺ Tier Shift Ôćĺ ÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞ×Ó╣î `085w` Ôćĺ Yes; ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ X Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖÓ╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞŐÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ = log ÓŞłÓŞ░ÓŞÜÓŞşÓŞü column title ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç X Ôćĺ ÓŞťÓŞíÓ╣üÓŞüÓ╣ëÓŞĽÓŞ▒ÓŞžÓŞłÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣î)

### 2026-06-14 - Fusion (CC_TierShift) -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: Capture/Reapply helper ÓŞúÓŞşÓŞÜ Replace Component (per-tier sub-master files) (_MASTERS b97f5ce) ÔĆ▒ ~00:45
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő (wrapper 2F0000-085043): sub-master Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ **Ó╣äÓŞčÓŞąÓ╣îÓ╣üÓŞóÓŞüÓŞúÓŞ▓ÓŞó tier** (2UP000-070043 vs -085043) Ôćĺ ÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç manual Replace Component (TierShift cell-switch Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞľÓŞÂÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞčÓŞąÓ╣îÓŞşÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞÖ). ÓŞŤÓŞ▒ÓŞŹÓŞźÓŞ▓Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ë: **Replace ÓŞŚÓŞ│ insert column ÓŞóÓŞŞÓŞÜÓ╣ÇÓŞźÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞş config Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞžÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞüÓ╣üÓŞľÓŞž** Ó╣ÇÓŞ¬ÓŞÁÓŞó per-row mapping (2FCLL0Ôćĺ2UPLL0, 2FCLR0Ôćĺ2UPLR0 ÔÇŽ). Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞ¬ÓŞ▒Ó╣łÓŞç: Ó╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ tool Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí + ÓŞíÓŞÁ option Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞüÓŞŚÓŞÁÓŞąÓŞ░ column/ÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö.
WHAT (`CC_TierShift_action.py`, 2 Ó╣éÓŞźÓŞíÓŞöÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł isolated ÔÇö ÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞ×Ó╣îÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł prompt target): **`cap`** = ÓŞłÓŞ│ pick ÓŞúÓŞ▓ÓŞó row ÓŞúÓŞ▓ÓŞó column (Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞü 1 column ÓŞźÓŞúÓŞĚÓŞş ALL ÓŞťÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ picker) Ôćĺ root attribute (ÓŞúÓŞşÓŞö Replace); **`re 085`** = ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç Replace ÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞş, ÓŞäÓŞĚÓŞÖ pick Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞąÓŞ░Ó╣üÓŞľÓŞž map Ôćĺtier Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł (2UPLL0-070043Ôćĺ2UPLL0-085043) ÓŞťÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ table ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç master Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł (cell.row.parentTable + itemByName + G36 phantom-guard) Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž rename Ó╣üÓŞľÓŞž wrapper Ôćĺ085 + save. Replace Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓŞçÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞç manual (Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁ public API). dispatch ÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó mode tag ÔÇö **Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣üÓŞĽÓŞ░ path tier-shift Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó**.
HOW: reuse API ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞ¬ÓŞ╣ÓŞłÓŞÖÓ╣î (getCellByColumnIndex / InsertCell.row / _shift_name / _extract_tier `-(\d{3})\d{3}`). Yes/No confirm ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖ reapply. Ó╣ÇÓŞéÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞÖ `last_run.log` Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ offline.
VERIFY: py_compile Ôťô; wiring grep Ôťô (cap/re/shift tag + dispatch + 5 helpers + json). **live = Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ (test Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë ÔÇö Fusion bridge ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞŞÓŞö)**; capture = read-only ÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞşÓŞöÓŞáÓŞ▒ÓŞóÓŞąÓŞşÓŞçÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ, reapply ÓŞíÓŞÁ confirm + map Ó╣ÇÓŞüÓ╣çÓŞÜ re-run Ó╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë. _MASTERS local Ôćĺ b97f5ce.
FLOW Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞö wrapper Ôćĺ Tier Shift `cap` (Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞü column/all) Ôćĺ manual **Replace All Instances** 070Ôćĺ085 sub-master Ôćĺ Tier Shift `re 085`. RELOAD: action mtime auto (Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç restart).
**NEEDS:** nothing. (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞąÓŞşÓŞç cap ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ (ÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ-only) ÓŞöÓŞ╣ log ÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞłÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ column+pick ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜ Ôćĺ Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞäÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞó Replace+`re 085`; ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ MISS/column index Ó╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞÁÓ╣ëÓŞóÓŞÖ ÓŞ¬Ó╣łÓŞç last_run.log ÓŞíÓŞ▓ ÓŞťÓŞíÓŞŤÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ)

### 2026-06-14 - Fusion (CC_TierShift) -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: FIX reapply Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞŚÓŞ│ÓŞçÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ ÔÇö ÓŞłÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣îÓŞťÓŞ┤ÓŞöÓ╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞúÓŞ▓ÓŞ░ index ÓŞéÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç Replace (_MASTERS 76d9e94)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ `re 085` Ôćĺ cells Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ (ÓŞäÓ╣łÓŞ▓Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞžÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö). debug ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü log ÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç: `[RE] col[5] captured='2UP000-070043' now='Rigid 7' ┬Ě set=0` Ôćĺ **ROOT CAUSE: Replace ÓŞ¬ÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞąÓŞ│ÓŞöÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣î** ÔÇö capture ÓŞłÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ index 5 (=2UP) Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç Replace index 5 = 'Rigid 7' (SuppressCell) Ôćĺ InsertCell-guard ÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö Ôćĺ set=0, ÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣î 2UP ÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣éÓŞöÓŞÖ.
FIX (3 ÓŞŐÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞÖ): (1) **key capture ÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó component BASE** ('2UP000') Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž re-resolve index ÓŞ¬ÓŞöÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó base ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖ reapply (Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞťÓŞ╣ÓŞü index); (2) **backward-compat ÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ capture Ó╣ÇÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞ▓** (index-keyed Ôćĺ derive base ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü title ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞüÓ╣çÓŞÜ) Ôćĺ Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő**Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç re-capture** (mapping 070043 Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ëÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë); (3) **match row Ó╣üÓŞÜÓŞÜÓŞĽÓŞ▒ÓŞö WWW** (`_norm_row` `-(\d{3})(\d{3})Ôćĺ-###\2`) ÓŞŚÓŞÖÓ╣üÓŞľÓŞžÓŞľÓŞ╣ÓŞü rename 070Ôćĺ085 ÓŞúÓŞ░ÓŞźÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞ▓ÓŞç. + log ÓŞąÓŞ░Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞö (live insert cols + set/miss/rows-not-in-map+sample).
VERIFY: py_compile Ôťô wiring grep Ôťô. _MASTERS local Ôćĺ 76d9e94. action mtime reload (Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç restart).
**NEEDS:** nothing. (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓ╣üÓŞäÓ╣łÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ `re 085` ÓŞőÓ╣ëÓŞ│ ÔÇö capture Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣âÓŞÖ attribute, Ó╣éÓŞäÓ╣ëÓŞöÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë + ÓŞłÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣îÓŞľÓŞ╣ÓŞü; ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞç MISS ÓŞ¬Ó╣łÓŞç last_run.log)

### 2026-06-14 - RD (dispatched research) -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő + session ÓŞľÓŞ▒ÓŞöÓ╣äÓŞŤ: Fusion **ÓŞíÓŞÁ API replace component** (Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞöÓŞŚÓŞ▓ÓŞç scripted Replace Ó╣ÇÓŞĽÓ╣çÓŞíÓŞ¬ÓŞ▓ÓŞó)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő feedback "ÓŞłÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞóÓŞçÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞíÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖ" Ôćĺ ÓŞłÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞó research Ó╣äÓŞŤ subagent (background). ÓŞťÓŞą (source = Fusion API docs help.autodesk.com):
- **`Occurrence.replace(newFile, replaceAll)`** (ÓŞĽ.ÓŞä.2023) ÓŞ¬ÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ external reference Ó╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë ┬Ě `newFile` = **`core.DataFile`** (hub Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞžÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ, Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ł path/Document) ┬Ě replaceAll bool ┬Ě fail ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ł external ref
- **`ConfigurationInsertColumn.occurrence`** (ÓŞí.ÓŞä.2024) = ÓŞ¬ÓŞ░ÓŞ×ÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ: get column Ôćĺ `.occurrence` Ôćĺ `.replace(newFile, ...)`. **ÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ active/open doc** (ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü DataFile ÓŞłÓŞ░ return null)
- ÔŁî Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁ API set Ó╣äÓŞčÓŞąÓ╣îÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç insert column ÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞçÓ╣ć; `switchConfiguration` = ÓŞ¬ÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ row Ó╣âÓŞÖÓ╣äÓŞčÓŞąÓ╣îÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞŚÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞÖ (ÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓ╣äÓŞčÓŞąÓ╣îÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë); `documentReference`/`configuredDataFile` read-only (Ó╣üÓŞäÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ version)
- ÔÜá **per-row preservation ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç replace Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞüÓŞ▓ÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞĽÓŞÁ** (Ó╣ÇÓŞ¬ÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖ UI) ÔÇö Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣ł cap/reapply ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞúÓŞ▓ (b97f5ce/76d9e94) ÓŞłÓŞ▒ÓŞöÓŞüÓŞ▓ÓŞúÓ╣ÇÓŞúÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞçÓŞÖÓŞÁÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž (capture ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ Ôćĺ reapply ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç)
- ÔÜá resolve `newFile` = Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞÖ `project.rootFolder.dataFiles` = **cloud crawl Ôćĺ ÓŞĽÓŞ┤ÓŞö guardrail** (ÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő idle Ó╣ÇÓŞŚÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞÖ)
**OPPORTUNITY:** ÓŞúÓŞžÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ **full-auto "Replace" mode Ó╣âÓŞÖ CC_TierShift** = capture Ôćĺ `occ.replace(newFile)` Ôćĺ reapply Ôćĺ rename Ó╣âÓŞÖÓŞäÓŞąÓŞ┤ÓŞüÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞž (ÓŞĽÓŞ▒ÓŞö manual Replace ÓŞŚÓŞ┤Ó╣ëÓŞç). **ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł build** ÔÇö ÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç live-test (Fusion bridge ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞŞÓŞö) + cloud-crawl ÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓŞÖÓŞ▒ÓŞö window. ref docs: Occurrence_replace.htm, ConfigurationInsertColumn_occurrence.htm.
**NEEDS:** Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓ╣ÇÓŞäÓŞ▓ÓŞ░ÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞłÓŞ░Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ë build full-auto Replace mode Ó╣äÓŞźÓŞí (ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖ bridge ÓŞüÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ + idle window) ÔÇö ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓŞ▓ ÓŞťÓŞí build + test ÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ throwaway copy ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ.

Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő feedback ÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü 8f68fae: "Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ fix hhh (Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣ëÓŞ▓) / fix www (Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç) Ó╣üÓŞÜÓŞÜÓŞÖÓŞÁÓ╣ëÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞüÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓" Ôćĺ generalize fill Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞŚÓŞ│Ó╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë **2 ÓŞŚÓŞ┤ÓŞĘ**. **ÓŞłÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞóÓŞçÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ subagent ÓŞşÓŞÁÓŞüÓŞúÓŞşÓŞÜ** (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞóÓ╣ëÓŞ│Ó╣ÇÓŞúÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞç dispatch).
WHAT (`CC_TierShift_action.py`): syntax ÔÇö `fill 120` ÓŞźÓŞúÓŞĚÓŞş `fill hhh 120` = fix HHH ÓŞąÓ╣çÓŞşÓŞä, vary WWW ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓŞŐÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓ╣üÓŞľÓŞž Ôćĺ `{base}-{rowWWW}{120}` (Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí, backward-compat) ┬Ě `fill www 085` = fix WWW ÓŞąÓ╣çÓŞşÓŞä, vary HHH ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓŞŐÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓ╣üÓŞľÓŞž Ôćĺ `{base}-{085}{rowHHH}` (Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł). detect `mode='www' if 'www' in input else 'hhh'`; value = 3-digit Ó╣üÓŞúÓŞü. helper Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł `_extract_hhh` (back 3 digits) ÓŞäÓŞ╣Ó╣ł `_extract_tier` (front). confirm/log ÓŞÜÓŞşÓŞüÓŞŐÓŞ▒ÓŞöÓŞ¬Ó╣łÓŞžÓŞÖÓ╣äÓŞźÓŞÖ fix/vary; skip Ó╣üÓŞľÓŞžÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞéÓŞ▓ÓŞöÓŞ¬Ó╣łÓŞžÓŞÖ vary. guards Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜ (single-col, cell-set mirror reapply, G36, save). intercept ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ `set_width`.
VERIFY (RD): `python -m py_compile` Ôťô ┬Ě commit e01dcb5 = **1 file pathspec** (68+/27-) Ôťô ┬Ě wiring (`_extract_hhh` L123 ┬Ě `_do_fill(mode,value)` L612 ┬Ě branch hhh/www L643/651/661 ┬Ě 3-tuple return L885 ┬Ě dispatch L956) Ôťô ┬Ě ÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ body 2 ÓŞŚÓŞ┤ÓŞĘ + prompt-parse ÓŞóÓŞĚÓŞÖÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ. **ÔÜá ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŚÓŞ¬ live (bridge ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞŞÓŞö)**.
**NEEDS (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő live-test):** 2BK000 Ôćĺ `fill 120` (ÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣îÓŞ¬ÓŞŞÓŞöÓŞŚÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞó) ÓŞĽÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí; ÓŞŚÓŞ┤ÓŞĘÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł `fill www 085` ÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓŞíÓŞÁ sub-master row `{base}-085{HHH}` ÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞçÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ. copy ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ master. reload by-mtime. -- RD

### 2026-06-15 - RD (Workflow: implement+verify) -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: CC_TierShift keyword **`fill`Ôćĺ`fix`** (ÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞ×Ó╣î `fix hhh 120` / `fix www 085`) (_MASTERS bd7f1c2)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: "ÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞ×Ó╣î fix HHH fix WWW" Ôćĺ Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ trigger keyword Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞçÓŞäÓŞ│ÓŞ×ÓŞ╣ÓŞö. **Ultracode on + Ó╣ÇÓŞŚÓŞ¬ live Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë (bridge ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞŞÓŞö) Ôćĺ Ó╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ë Workflow** (implement Ôćĺ adversarial verify 3 ÓŞíÓŞŞÓŞíÓ╣üÓŞŚÓŞÖ live test).
WHAT (`CC_TierShift_action.py`): trigger = `low.startswith('fix') or low.startswith('fill')` (**`fix` ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞü, `fill` Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ alias**); syntax `fix hhh 120` (fix HHH, vary WWW) ┬Ě `fix www 085` (fix WWW, vary HHH) ┬Ě `fix 120` (default hhh). full sweep: tuple tag `'fix'` + dispatch ┬Ě `_do_fillÔćĺ_do_fix` (def+call) ┬Ě log prefix `[FILL]Ôćĺ[FIX]` ┬Ě dialog `FILLÔćĺFIX column` ┬Ě save msg ┬Ě help ┬Ě comments. **logic Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣üÓŞĽÓŞ░** (single-col guard, cell-set mirror reapply, G36, _extract_tier/_extract_hhh, target string, save).
VERIFY: Workflow 3 lens **ok=true** (parse trace ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü input + intercept ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ set_width + Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞŐÓŞÖ cap/re/normal target ┬Ě completeness: tagÔćödispatch + defÔćöcall ÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞç, Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁ stale ┬Ě regression: Ó╣éÓŞźÓŞíÓŞöÓŞşÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞÖÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜ + logic Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí + py_compile). **RD verify Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓŞç:** py_compile Ôťô ┬Ě HEAD bd7f1c2 msg ÓŞ¬ÓŞ░ÓŞşÓŞ▓ÓŞö ┬Ě 1 file pathspec (31+/30-) Ôťô ┬Ě grep trigger/tag/dispatch/fn ÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞç + NO_STALE_FILL_TOKENS Ôťô. ÔÜá ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŚÓŞ¬ live.
**NEEDS (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő live-test):** 2BK000 Ôćĺ Tier Shift Ôćĺ `fix 120` (= fix HHH ÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣îÓŞ¬ÓŞŞÓŞöÓŞŚÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞó) Ôćĺ Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞüÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞéÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣î Ôćĺ Yes. ÓŞŚÓŞ┤ÓŞĘÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł `fix www 085`. copy ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ master ┬Ě cell Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ Ôćĺ ÓŞ¬Ó╣łÓŞç last_run.log. reload by-mtime. -- RD

### 2026-06-15 - G2 (WEB16) -> RD 07 + e: VISUAL CONFIG BROWSER shipped (7994db6, LIVE ÔÇö e approved the look)
RD 07 dispatch (visual-first config browser). Built Ôćĺ screenshot Ôćĺ **e approved ("OK ÓŞ×ÓŞŞÓŞŐ Ó╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣î 0├Ś0 ÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó")** Ôćĺ pushed.
WHAT (app.js only, pathspec):
- **Cube engine EXTRACTED to module-scope `_f2CubeKit()`** (geometry/colors/`cube`/`fnIcon`/`fcIcon`/bulb/dash) ÔÇö `_openF2Reference` refactored to reuse it, renders IDENTICAL (icons never redrawn, per RD). cube/fnIcon/fcIcon now take an optional pixel size. **Future visual surfaces: reuse `_f2CubeKit()`, don't redraw.**
- `_decodeF2Code(code)`: 13-char (2[TT][L][H][V]-WWWHHH) Ôćĺ cube icon + short English desc (kind ┬Ě hand ┬Ě light ┬Ě W├ŚH). Logic only.
- `_openConfigBrowser()`: kdstock modal, inline `<style>` (NO style.css touch), cards = big cube icon + decoded desc + small 13-char code; **REAL F2 codes only** `^2[A-Z0-9]{5}-\d{6}$` from auto_generated + project parts (NEVER fabricated; empty data Ôćĺ SAMPLE-badged cards + banner). Live search; grouped by design KIND (BK/CF/CN/DN/FC/FN/SD/UP) ÔÇö `_remapFamilyForCode` collapses all F2 to one bucket so I group by idx1-2 instead.
- Click card Ôćĺ `_routeLeafToFusion({code, urn:_urnForCode, drawing_urn, status:'stale'}, {fusionOnly:true})` = .f2d-if-drawn-else-3D (reused, not reimplemented).
- Entry = a cube header button injected next to `#ref-btn` via app.js init (NO index.html edit, idempotent).
VERIFIED (preview, e-approved screenshot): 56 real F2 configs / 8 groups; decoded descs correct; cards render cube icons; urn-bearing card (2BK001-070120) Ôćĺ bridge `urn=ÔÇŽ&kind=drawing` Ôťô; **44/56 have a Fusion urn** (open Fusion), 12 url-less library masters Ôćĺ router's re-run-CC_Assembly alert (existing behavior; **none have a PDF yet Ôćĺ opens 3D master**); F2 reference modal unchanged (25 SVGs); node --check + node --test 24/24 + 0 console errors; deploy 27535259598 success; live markers Ôťô.
PHASE-2 (RD noted): CC_ export config-rows from Fusion Ôćĺ feed the browser ALL variants + urns (so the 12 url-less + future configs open + the catalog is complete). That's the Fusion lane.
FYI: app.js touched Ôćĺ pull --rebase. pathspec app.js + plan doc only.
**NEEDS:** nothing (phase-2 = Fusion lane when e wants it). -- G2 (WEB16)

### 2026-06-18 - RD (cross-lane dispatch) -> Fusion lane (Fusion 22) + WEB lane (WEB 16): NO-DXF parts Ôćĺ export DXF Ôćĺ web Nest ÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞúÓŞ╣Ó╣ë (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: parts ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖ **"NO DXF"** Ó╣âÓŞÖ web Nest (review list = ÔÜá, Ó╣ÇÓŞŐÓ╣łÓŞÖ 2BK100-067120 / 2BK400-066500 / 2CF000-061000 / 2CN000-120000 ÔÇŽ) Ôćĺ ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓ╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞüÓŞöÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü Fusion Ó╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ë **Create Sheet Metal DXF** ÓŞźÓŞúÓŞĚÓŞş **CC Laser Pipeline (­čöą)** ÓŞ¬Ó╣łÓŞç DXF Ó╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ laser folder Ôćĺ **web Nest ÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞúÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞÁ DXF Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž** (Ó╣ÇÓŞäÓŞąÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞúÓ╣î ÔÜá Ôćĺ Ôťô ÓŞ×ÓŞúÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞí nest).
ÓŞíÓŞÁÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž (ÔÜá Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞąÓŞ░ lane ÓŞóÓŞĚÓŞÖÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ path ÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞçÓ╣âÓŞÖÓ╣éÓŞäÓ╣ëÓŞöÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ ÔÇö memory ÓŞşÓŞ▓ÓŞł stale): CC_Laser (­čöą) export DXF Ôćĺ `Drawings/dxf/<master>/<stem>.dxf` + RTDB `uploaded_dxfs/<stem>` + git push ([[reference_cc_laser]]); web Nest probe DXF ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü uploaded_dxfs + Drawings/dxf/ ([[reference_simbend_sync_favorites]]). Ôćĺ pipeline ÓŞíÓŞÁÓŞÜÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞ¬Ó╣łÓŞžÓŞÖ, **gap = trigger ÓŞúÓŞ▓ÓŞó no-dxf part + web auto re-detect**.

**CONTRACT (RD Ó╣ÇÓŞ¬ÓŞÖÓŞş ÔÇö 2 lane ÓŞóÓŞĚÓŞÖÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ/ÓŞŤÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞÜÓŞÖ board ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ build):**
- DXF ÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞóÓŞŚÓŞ▓ÓŞç: `drawings-ui/Drawings/dxf/<master>/<code>.dxf` + RTDB `uploaded_dxfs/<code>` (format CC_Laser Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí, ÓŞŐÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞş = code Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣ŐÓŞ░ case-sensitive)

### 2026-06-20 - G2 (WEB16) -> RD + Fusion 22: VERIFY DONE ÔÇö contract Ôťů web side ┬Ě ÔÜá the gap is `nest.js` (WEB14 lane), NOT app.js
Read code per RD's "ÓŞóÓŞĚÓŞÖÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ path probe ÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞçÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ build". Findings:
**Ôťů CONTRACT CONFIRMED (web side):** the Nest tool reads RTDB **`uploaded_dxfs/<code>`** and matches by **EXACT `part.code` (case-SENSITIVE)** ÔÇö `nest.js:656` `firebaseDB.ref('uploaded_dxfs').once('value')` Ôćĺ `nest.js:698` `const meta = dxfsAll[part.code]` Ôćĺ `part.dxfUrl = meta.url`. So Fusion MUST write `uploaded_dxfs/<key>` where **key == the manifest `part.code` byte-for-byte** (any case drift Ôćĺ no match Ôćĺ stays NO-DXF), and `meta.url` = the raw URL of `Drawings/dxf/<master>/<code>.dxf`. RD's proposed contract = correct; the ONE hard requirement on Fusion = the uploaded_dxfs **key case** must equal manifest part.code. ([[reference_cc_laser]] CC_Laser already does code-named keys ÔÇö Fusion 22 please re-confirm the key it writes == manifest code for these specific NO-DXF parts.)
**ÔÜá LANE REALITY ÔÇö the auto-detect is NOT app.js:**
- app.js **already auto-updates**: `initUploadedDxfsSync` (app.js:3508) = LIVE `uploaded_dxfs.on('value')` Ôćĺ `_backgroundRender()` (admin). So the app.js **Cut List** `ÔÜá no DXF` already self-clears when a DXF lands. Nothing to do there.
- The GAP is the **Nest TOOL = `nest.js`** (`window.kdNest`): `_loadProjectParts` fetches uploaded_dxfs via **`.once()`** into its OWN `S.dxfsAll` ÔÇö **no live listener** Ôćĺ an OPEN nest keeps NO-DXF until the project is re-opened. Fix = add a live `uploaded_dxfs.on` in nest.js Ôćĺ re-probe NO-DXF parts in place Ôćĺ scroll-preserving re-render (nest.js has its OWN render, NOT app.js's `_backgroundRender`) + optional "recheck DXF" button. **This is `nest.js` = WEB14's lane**, not app.js ÔÇö RD's "pathspec app.js" doesn't fit.
**DECISION NEEDED (RD):** (a) reassign to a WEB14/nest.js session, OR (b) authorize WEB16 to take `nest.js` for this ÔÇö if (b), **I CLAIM `nest.js` here** (no other lane touch it until I post done) and build it (live listener + in-place re-probe + recheck btn). Ready either way; holding build until RD picks + Fusion 22 acks the key-case point. -- G2 (WEB16)

### 2026-06-20 - G2 (WEB16) -> RD + e: "reload ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣üÓŞŚÓ╣çÓŞÜÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí" = ALREADY DONE (374be96, WEB15) ÔÇö verified, NOT rebuilding
RD dispatch "reload Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣ëÓŞ▓/Ó╣üÓŞŚÓ╣çÓŞÜÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí". verify-in-code-first: **already shipped** by WEB15 tap-to-reload (374be96). `__kdBeforeReload()` (app.js:12984) stashes `{view, stack, scrollY, t}` Ôćĺ **sessionStorage `kd_nav_restore`** on `pagehide` (any reload/F5) AND the new-build pill calls it explicitly (index.html:271 `window.__kdBeforeReload(); location.reload()`); init (app.js:12936) restores `view` = **the active tab** + `.tab.active` + `stack` (drill-in) + scrollY, gated to fresh reload (<30s) + role-visible tab.
VERIFIED (preview, admin): Library Ôćĺ reload Ôćĺ lands Library Ôťô; Nest Ôćĺ PLAIN `location.reload()` (browser auto-pagehide, no manual call) Ôćĺ lands Nest Ôťô; drill into 02 Ruth Ôćĺ reload Ôćĺ still INSIDE (not bounced home) Ôťô. sessionStorage (per-tab) is the RIGHT store ÔÇö a NEW tab starts clean; **don't switch to localStorage** (would wrongly restore in new tabs).
RD's list all covered: persist tab Ôťô ┬Ě scroll/sub-state Ôťô ┬Ě new-build-banner reload lands same tab Ôťô. **No code change.**
**Only non-restore cases (by design):** (1) <30s freshness guard ÔÇö bites only if a reload takes >30s / tab suspended for ages (normal reload stamps `t` at pagehide, seconds before restore Ôćĺ always passes); (2) DEEP tool sub-state NOT in `stack` (being INSIDE a `kdNest` workspace / a Sim.Bending project selection restores to that TAB's home, not the deep tool). FIX (app.js + nest.js, claimed lane): new **`window.kdNest.currentProject()`** (= `S.projectKey` while the workspace is mounted, else null). `__kdBeforeReload` stashes it (`nestProject`); init, after restoring the Nest tab, re-opens it via `kdNest.openProject(nestProject)` (waits for kdNest if it loads late; skips if the project is gone). ### 2026-06-20 - G2 (WEB16) -> RD + Fusion 22: ÔÜá drag-drop 2CN000-120000 ÔÇö "set Ôťô but didn't replace" ÔÇö INVESTIGATED, root cause Ôëá what was reported (444ea65, LIVE)
RD 07 dispatch said the drop sets Ôťô optimistically but the real repo file stays 197KB (didn't replace) Ôćĺ fix sha-replace + cache-bust. **I investigated before fixing (systematic-debugging) ÔÇö the reported cause is wrong:**
- `git log` for `Drawings/dxf/2CN000-120000/2CN000-120000.dxf` = **ONE commit, ffe5584 "Admin drop", 197403 bytes** = the file's ONLY version. So it was a **CREATE** (`_ghGetFileSha`Ôćĺnull, nothing to replace), not a failed replace.
- `_uploadPartDxf` (app.js:1504-1520) **already sha-replaces correctly** (GET-shaÔćĺPUT-with-sha / no-sha=create). nest.js drop reads `files[0]` fresh Ôćĺ uploads the EXACT dropped File. **Upload pipeline is correct end-to-end.**
- The committed 197KB **IS exactly what Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő dropped**: a FACETED export ÔÇö 345 LINE + 34 CIRCLE + 11 ARC + 4 SPLINE ÔÇö that `_extractPolygons` reads as a **DEGENERATE outline** (no valid closed outer Ôćĺ can't nest). That's the real "view/size ÓŞ×ÓŞ▒ÓŞç". The "44KB clean" RD expected = what the file SHOULD be; Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's source/drop was the bloated one.
THE ACTUAL BUG (web honesty, fixed): the drop **blanket-stripped review + flashed a clean Ôťô**, and re-fetched from `raw` (CDN can serve the OLD cached file minutes after a replace). So a broken file looked "fixed."
FIX (nest.js, WEB16 lane):
- `_loadOneDxf` gains `opts.text` Ôćĺ parse the just-uploaded BYTES directly (no fetch) Ôćĺ size/view = EXACTLY what landed, zero CDN-cache lie.
- Drop success now parses via `{text}` then computes honest state: `_reviewReasons(part)` (degenerate / gross size-vs-code) + drop-local bloat check (file Ôëą150KB = faceted) Ôćĺ any reason Ôćĺ **ÔÜá + review row + tooltip** ("degenerate outline; bloated 193 KB ÔÇö re-export clean vector"). Only a truly clean parse Ôćĺ Ôťô.
VERIFIED (preview 02 Ruth, REAL drop events, 0 console err): real clean 24KB (2BK001-060120) Ôćĺ Ôťô + W/H 1173├Ś589; **Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's real 197KB (2CN000-120000) Ôćĺ ÔÜá + "degenerate outline; bloated 193 KB ÔÇö re-export clean vector"**; synthetic 181KB Ôćĺ ÔÜá "bloated 181 KB"; deploy 27858707373 success; live markers Ôťô.
**Ôćĺ Fusion 22 (G1): THE SYSTEMIC FIX IS YOURS** ÔÇö 2CN000-120000 (and any ­čöą'd code whose DXF is 150KB+/degenerate) needs a **clean true-vector re-export** ([[reference_vector_only]] / CC_Laser vector-by-default). The web now sha-REPLACES on the next clean drop (verified) ÔÇö so re-export + ­čöą, or Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő re-drops the clean DXF, and ÔÜáÔćĺÔťô for real. Want a GLOBAL bloat-lint (flag Ôëą150KB DXFs as review on normal load too, not just drop)? Say so ÔÇö held it drop-local to avoid flooding Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő with warnings on legacy faceted files.
**NEEDS:** Fusion 22 ÔÇö clean re-export of 2CN000-120000 (degenerate/faceted). -- G2 (WEB16)

- app.js has a module-level `view` ('projects'|'nest'|'simbend'|'drawing'|'library') + `stack` (nav drill). `render()` reads them (grep `function render()` ~line 4640; `if (view === ...)`). Tab buttons set `view` (grep `#tab-` / `view =`).
- Approach: persist `view` (and ideally the drill `stack` + scrollTop) to localStorage `kd_active_tab` on every tab change / navTo; on init (after manifest load, before first render) restore it. URL hash is an alternative but localStorage matches existing kd_* patterns.

### 2026-06-20 - G2 (WEB16) -> RD + Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: ÔťĆ´ŞĆ INLINE RENAME / re-point part code in Nest list ÔÇö web override (5a8eb20, LIVE)
RD task + Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő approved "web override" (asked via AskUserQuestion). Fix a legacy/typo'd code in the Nest part list (e.g. 2CVH19-346LL0 Ôćĺ 2CH000-ÔÇŽ) WITHOUT touching Fusion/real DXF files.
WHAT (nest.js, my lane):
- ÔťĆ´ŞĆ pencil on every part row (admin) Ôćĺ inline edit (Enter=save ┬Ě Esc/blur=cancel ┬Ě type the ORIGINAL code to revert). Renamed rows show **"ÔťÄ <code>"** + "renamed from <orig>" tooltip.

### 2026-06-20 - G2 (WEB14) -> RD + Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: RELOAD-KEEP-TAB ÔÇö kd_active_tab layer DONE (2504502, LIVE)
STATUS: reload-keep-tab spec (84f916b) fully satisfied. pathspec app.js only.
RECONCILE (read current code first): same-tab reload-keep was ALREADY live via sessionStorage `kd_nav_restore` + __kdBeforeReload/pagehide (374be96 + f1aad9b) ÔÇö keeps view+stack+scroll+open-nest on F5 / new-build pill. Spec's localStorage `kd_active_tab` delta = persist the TAB across a brand-NEW tab / browser restart (sessionStorage resets there). Added it as a clean LAYER, not a rewrite.
WHAT: `_saveActiveTab()` (called from render()) writes {view, stack, nestProject} to localStorage `kd_active_tab` on every nav. init() restores it ONLY when (a) no exact-reload state (kd_nav_restore absent) AND (b) no explicit ?p= / #code deep-link (those win); role-gated (_visibleTabsForRole ÔÇö a laser worker won't reopen a hidden tab); missing-project drilled entries dropped; nest workspace re-entered. Captured BEFORE the first render() (else render()'s own _saveActiveTab clobbers it ÔÇö caught + fixed in test).
PRIORITY: kd_nav_restore (sessionStorage, exact same-tab reload incl. scroll) wins; kd_active_tab (localStorage, last tab) is the fresh-tab/restart fallback.
VERIFIED live (preview 1280x900): tabÔćĺLibrary, fresh-tab boot (no kd_nav_restore) Ôćĺ lands on Library; same-tab reload still restores via kd_nav_restore (Drawing kept ÔÇö NO regression); laser role + kd_active_tab=library(hidden) Ôćĺ falls to projects (role guard); 0 console errors. node --check clean; deploy success; live marker kd_active_tab present (?cb bust).
FYI WEB16/WEB15: app.js touched (render() + init() + new _saveActiveTab) Ôćĺ pull --rebase before your next app.js-adjacent read. Did NOT touch nest.js/style.css/editor.
**NEEDS:** nothing.

### 2026-06-20 - G2 (WEB16) -> RD 08 + Fusion 22 + Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: NO-DXF auto-detect SHIPPED ÔÇö live ÔÜáÔćĺÔťô when a DXF lands (a7844c4, LIVE)
The pending lane item is DONE. While the Nest list is open, a live `uploaded_dxfs.on('value')` listener clears a part's ÔÜá to Ôťô on its own the moment its DXF arrives ÔÇö Fusion ­čöą export OR another device's drop ÔÇö **no reopen**.
- Re-resolve + `_loadOneDxf` via **raw directUrl** (immediate, no jsdelivr lag) Ôćĺ `_refreshViewKeepScroll` (scroll preserved, **NO jump** ÔÇö Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣ëÓŞ▓Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí"). Debounced 400ms so a Fusion BATCH upload re-renders ONCE. Won't loop (dxfLoaded skips done; broken file keeps uploaded_at Ôćĺ no retry until a newer upload). Also retries an ERRORED part when a NEWER uploaded_at lands (= Fusion re-exported a clean one to the same path Ôćĺ e.g. the 2CN000-120000 degenerate fix will auto-clear when you ­čöą it).

KEY: project onto a SAME-plane gives 0 entities (degenerate); project onto an OFFSET plane gives real curves (142). Both saveAsDXF and createDXFSketchExportOptions combine the connected outline into one bulge-LWPOLYLINE + keep separate holes as CIRCLE.
FIX = add as a FALLBACK in CC_Laser._export_dxfs_api: when exportManager.execute(flatPattern) raises -> project flatBody face -> offset sketch -> sketch DXF export -> transient cleanup (deleteMe sketch + plane), no save. Makes CC_Laser robust to broken-flat-reference parts with no manual repair.

**Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's live blocker is RESOLVED.** The `NameError: name 'log' is not defined` she hit on a real ­čöą (2CN000-120000, dialog hung 0/1) was a latent bug: `_export_dxfs_api`'s inline broken-flat/sketch-fallback branch referenced an UNBOUND `log`. While building RC1 I extracted that per-part export into **`_export_one_flat(des, comp, key, log)`** (log now a real param) and `_export_dxfs_api` creates `log=[]` locally Ôćĺ the crash path no longer exists. (The earlier MCP confirm called `_export_via_sketch_fallback` directly with log supplied, so it never exercised the `_export_dxfs_api` health-detect path ÔÇö that's why the bug slipped; verified now via committed-blob grep + py_compile.)

**RC1 config-row-walk = BUILT in the same commit 104568b** (the WIP an observer saw on disk = this session's, now committed ÔÇö DO NOT re-commit a parallel version):
- `_export_config_rows(des, ui, root)`: mirrors CC_ExportFlat row-walk. Capture active row Ôćĺ per real-code row (`_looks_like_code` skips templates): activate Ôćĺ **computeAll()** (NON-destructive per-row recompute so each DXF is its OWN geom, never a cached neighbour's ÔÇö we NEVER deleteMe the user's flat) Ôćĺ `_export_one_flat` Ôćĺ restore active row. NEVER saves. Checks `activate()` return (FalseÔćĺfail, no stale export), breaks on cancel.
- `run()`: gated to **single_part config masters** (assemblies keep the per-occurrence path). Registers every exported row in `agg` so the web-upload filter (`bom_keys=agg.keys()`) publishes ALL rows, not just active; clears active-row leaf aliases to avoid mis-routing.
- drive-by: module-level `import json` (line 1064 used bare `json` Ôćĺ NameError silently emptying the manifest version map; in the path RC1 exercises).

VERIFY-before-done: py_compile OK ┬Ě `_rc1_offline_test.py` **19/19 PASS** (walk all real rows / skip template / restore orig / gate ÔëĄ1 row / computeAll per row / activate=FalseÔćĺno stale export / continue past failure) ┬Ě adversarial-review subagent Ôćĺ fixed its HIGH #1 (stale-flat Ôćĺ computeAll harden), HIGH #2 (json), MED #3 (alias clobber), #5 (activate return). committed-blob grep confirms (no stale Read).

**NEEDS Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő** (live-only ÔÇö row-activate + flat recompute can't be unit-tested offline): reload CC_Laser (StopÔćĺRun) Ôćĺ re-­čöą on 2CN027 / 2CN000-120000 Ôćĺ (1) confirm NO crash + dialog completes, (2) eyeball the Laser folder: 2CN000-000000.dxf and 2CN000-120000.dxf should EXIST and DIFFER in size (different Z). The FlatPattern feature's stationary-face ref is invalid for those 18 configurations.
  - NOTE: my `computeAll()` (RC1 #1 harden) did its job ÔÇö it forced honest per-config recompute. WITHOUT it these would have silently returned the cached BASE flat Ôćĺ 18 wrong-geometry DXFs under variant names (the stale-flat bug). Better to fail loud.
- **Two follow-up fixes (215fd0a):** (1) the note "ALL 1 real rows" was misleading (used api_ok count) Ôćĺ now "1/19 config rows exported". (2) the missing-DXF fallback fired the native DXF Creator on those 18 non-active rows Ôćĺ it only does the ACTIVE row + CRASHED on the broken flat (the 2nd error dialog Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő saw). **NEEDS Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő (source repair, her call):** 2UP000-067000's FlatPattern feature errors for the 18 hand/corner variants. (Until then, only the base row has a web DXF ÔÇö the 18 variants stay NO-DXF, but now with a CLEAR ÔŤö reason, no crash, no useless dialog.)

### 2026-06-20 - Fusion 23 (G1) -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő + RD: LIVE-DIAGNOSED the 2UP000-067000 18-fail via MCP ÔÇö ROOT CAUSE = master has NO saved FlatPattern (transient-create corrupts the config walk)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "MCP Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó" Ôćĺ I opened 2UP000-067000 via MCP (read-only diag, closed WITHOUT save after) and isolated it:
- Structure: 19-row config single-part master (base + 18 hand/corner L/N/R variants), 1 sheet body, 0 occ. Cols = X/NumH/DW params + many Hole* suppress. **Timeline has NO FlatPattern feature** (transient only).
- A **single** `createFlatPattern` on a freshly-active variant (2UPNL2-067043) **SUCCEEDS** (flatBody 68 faces) Ôćĺ the variants ARE flattenable individually.
- But the **row-walk** (activate row Ôćĺ create transient flat Ôćĺ deleteMe Ôćĺ next row) **CORRUPTS the configured design after the FIRST row**: `comp.flatPattern` getter then raises `InternalValidationError : res` for every subsequent row, and `createFlatPattern` says "flat already exists" (stale invalid flat lingers post-deleteMe). => exactly the ­čöą result: **1/19 exported (the first row), 18 fail.** with/without `des.computeAll()` = identical, so computeAll is NOT the trigger; the transient create+deleteMe on a config design is.
- **ROOT CAUSE: masters WITHOUT a saved FlatPattern can't be row-walked** ÔÇö the per-row transient create poisons the flat state. Masters that WORK (e.g. 2CN027) have a reusable flat (created=False, no transient create, no corruption).
- ÔÜá´ŞĆ **VERSION CHURN observed**: opened v8 Ôćĺ ended v9 during the MCP session (I never explicitly saved; closed saved:false). Suspect `ConfigurationRow.activate()` auto-versions a configured design. If so, **every ­čöą row-walk may bump the master's version** ÔÇö needs confirmation; flagging as a real concern.

**FIX for Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő (source, unblocks all 19 rows):** open 2UP000-067000 Ôćĺ add a **FlatPattern feature** to the master (pick a face valid across ALL configs) Ôćĺ **SAVE** Ôćĺ re-­čöą. The walk then REUSES the saved flat per config (no transient create Ôćĺ no corruption) Ôćĺ all 19 rows export. (Same shape as 2CN027 which works.)

**Code (c35ebce):** refined RC1's ÔŤö failure message to name this cause + the fix. NO behavior change. The deeper RC1 hardening (make the transient-create path non-corrupting, and confirm/avoid version churn) should be developed+tested on a THROWAWAY COPY, not Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's live master ÔÇö flagging for a focused session. CLEANUP done: 2UP000-067000 closed WITHOUT save (my diag pollution discarded), active doc back to 2CN027 v21 clean.
-- Fusion 23 (G1) ÔĆ▒ live MCP diagnosis + cleanup

- **(b) Shared active-row resolver** (scanner.py `resolve_active_code` + `_strip_code_name`): CC_Assembly.project_name AND CC_Laser._project_key_for now BOTH delegate to ONE function (strips '(vN~recovered)' Ôćĺ ' vN' Ôćĺ ext) so the project key can NEVER drift between them (a drift = manifest/DXF uploads under different projects = the exact web 'NO DXF' class). - WHY only 2 capsules show ("F2 2/2"): the web groups by `variant_root`. ### 2026-06-20 - Fusion 23 (G1) -> RD (relay Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő): F2 capsule fix SHIPPED (9a637f7) ÔÇö vr anchors at nearest CODED ancestor
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "Ó╣üÓŞüÓ╣ë" Ôćĺ fixed the F-group variant_root gap. ROOT (found via read-only MCP trace of 02 Ruth): F2's sub-assemblies are labelled with **NON-CODE occurrence names** (e.g. `2N601`, `2N602` ÔÇö len<6, no '-' Ôćĺ `scanner._extract_code`ÔćĺNone). The old vr logic anchored on `vr_anc[0]` ONLY Ôćĺ those branches got vr='' Ôćĺ leaves leaked into the **"F2 ┬Ě DIRECT"** bucket instead of their cabinet capsule. (The `2N601`-style nodes are the real Fusion sub-assembly occurrences; the coded cabinets like `2FCLL0-070043`/`2FNLR0-067000` sit one level below them.)
- **FIX (CC_Assembly.py 9a637f7):** new `_vr_from_anc(vr_anc)` walks the (already F-stripped) chain for the FIRST ancestor that extracts a real code Ôćĺ anchors vr at the nearest coded sub-cabinet. Applied at BOTH the leaf-vr and node_c/container-vr sites so they shift together (parent-linking stays consistent).
- **STRICTLY no-regression:** when `vr_anc[0]` already extracts a code, `_vr_from_anc` returns it on the first iteration (== old result) Ôćĺ F1 + the working `2FXLL0` coded-cabinet anchoring UNCHANGED. Cut-list invariant (vr is only the grouping key ÔÇö counts/qty untouched).
- **Verify:** py_compile + `test_fgroup_layer.py` **31/31** (added a non-code-intermediate case: `F2 > 2N601 > 2FCLL0-070043 > leaf` Ôćĺ vr=`2FCLL0-070043`, no empty-vr leak) + adversarial-review = **SHIP** (confirmed no-regression at both sites + cut-list invariance + parent-link consistency).
- **NEEDS Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő (live validate):** reload CC_Assembly (so 9a637f7 is live) Ôćĺ re-scan / ­čöą 02 Ruth Ôćĺ the 2FCLL0/2FNLR0 leaves now carry their variant_root in the manifest Ôćĺ re-add 02 Ruth to the nest Ôćĺ F2 shows each coded sub-cabinet as its own capsule (more than 2). NOTE: capsules form at the CODED sub-cabinet level (2FCLL0/2FNLR0/2FNL00ÔÇŽ), since the `2N601`-style parents have no codes.
-- Fusion 23 (G1) ÔĆ▒ F2 vr-anchor fix shipped + verified (needs live re-scan)

### 2026-06-20 - G2 (WEB nest) -> e + RD: "Ôć╗ Re-resolve codes" button DONE+LIVE (f0c6a7c) ÔĆ▒ 00:38
STATUS: shipped RD's dispatch (e approved) ÔÇö one-click heal for nest parts stuck NO-DXF on a stale snapshot code after a Fusion CC_Assembly rename (e.g. 2CN027-000000 Ôćĺ 2CN002-120000). nest.js + style.css, pathspec.
WHY a refresh didn't help: a LOADED nest re-reads its OWN saved snapshot codes (nest_jobs), not the manifest ÔÇö so the old code persists Ôćĺ uploaded_dxfs/<old>=null Ôćĺ NO-DXF. Remove + "+ Project" re-add was the only fix.
WHAT (`_reresolveCodes`, parts-head toolbar button "Ôć╗ Re-resolve"):
- Re-fetches a FRESH manifest (?t= CDN cache-miss + no-store) Ôćĺ sees CURRENT codes even when the in-memory/CDN copy OR the loaded snapshot is stale.
- Builds **urn Ôćĺ current-code** maps across every source project (multi-project aware). Fusion lineage **urn = the STABLE key** (never changes on rename; the code does).
- Per part: adopt current code by urn (recovers a missing urn from the manifest for un-drifted parts / pre-urn jobs), apply ÔťĆ´ŞĆ override, re-link uploaded_dxfs/<correct-code>, re-apply grain rules, reload DXF in place via the STANDARD `_loadOneDxf` (jsdelivr-mapped + commit-pin ÔÇö a raw directUrl fails CORS on the synthetic github.io host; that was a debug catch).
- Remaps laid-out sheet placements to the new code + re-attaches polys Ôćĺ saved cut sheets follow the rename.
- `_refreshViewKeepScroll` (no jump); reports "Re-resolved N code(s) ┬Ě M now linked ┬Ě K still missing".
- **urn now persisted** in saved jobs (`_serializePart`) + restored (`_restoreJob`) Ôćĺ future loads re-resolve without the manifest-recovery step.
- style.css: `.kdnest-parts-head` Ôćĺ `flex-wrap:wrap` so the now-6-button toolbar wraps instead of overflowing the sidebar right edge (part ROWS stay 1 no-wrap line ÔÇö unaffected).
VERIFY (live preview, 02 Ruth, admin): simulated a stale-code NO-DXF part (urn kept) Ôćĺ click Ôć╗ Ôćĺ code restored, DXF re-linked+loaded (W├ŚH 607├Ś52, 40 vector entities), row Ôćĺ Ôťô, scroll preserved (set 78 Ôćĺ stayed 78), alert "Re-resolved 1 code ┬Ě 1 now linked to a DXF". No-op path: "All codes already current", idempotent, no damage. Toolbar wraps clean (no x-overflow). node --check clean; 0 console errors; deploy live (curl cache-bust: nest.js 5 markers + style.css wrap marker present).
NB for e: load a nest with a NO-DXF part that was renamed in Fusion Ôćĺ click "Ôć╗ Re-resolve" in the parts toolbar Ôćĺ it links the DXF + size in place (no remove/re-add). Old saved nests (pre-today) with an ALREADY-drifted code + no urn can't auto-bridge ÔÇö those still need remove + re-add once; everything saved from now on carries the urn.
FYI: nest.js + style.css touched -> other lane pull --rebase.
**NEEDS:** nothing.

### 2026-06-20 - G2 (WEB nest) -> e + RD: ROOT-CAUSE FIX ÔÇö Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's 3 "NO-DXF" parts were layer-"0" DXFs w/ null bbox (18975c2, LIVE) ÔĆ▒ 00:22
STATUS: shipped RD's urgent debug dispatch. RD's key-mismatch hypothesis was NOT it ÔÇö debugged the real cause + fixed at the root. nest.js, pathspec.
THE CLUE RD gave (correct displayed code + still NO-DXF + Ôć╗ "all current") was the tell. Inspected 2CN000-120000 / 2CN002-120024 / 2DN000-060000 live: all three have `dxfLoaded:true`, dxfError:null, uploaded_dxfs key present + 200, polys + entities present (35/59/45) ÔÇö **but bbox=null Ôćĺ w/h 0** Ôćĺ row renders blank W├ŚH = looks NO-DXF.
ROOT CAUSE: fetched 2CN000-120000.dxf raw Ôćĺ **every entity is on layer "0"** (34 CIRCLE + 1 LWPOLYLINE), NOT OUTER_PROFILES/INTERIOR_PROFILES. `_extractPolygons` computes bbox ONLY from /OUTER/|/INTERIOR/ layers (by design, to ignore stray dim/construction lines) Ôćĺ a layer-"0" DXF matches none Ôćĺ bbox null Ôćĺ w/h 0. These are CC_Laser fallback/sketch exports that don't tag the cut layer. (So it was NEVER a stale code / key-mismatch / Ôć╗ bug ÔÇö Ôć╗ correctly saw them as loaded.)
FIX: track a 2nd bbox over EVERY cut entity (any non-bend layer) and use it as a FALLBACK only when the strict OUTER/INTERIOR bbox is null. Normal parts unchanged (tight tagged bbox still wins, construction lines still ignored); a layer-"0" part now gets its real extent. Heals on a normal page LOAD ÔÇö no Ôć╗ needed.
VERIFY (live preview, 02 Ruth, admin): the 3 parts now load real dims ÔÇö 2CN000-120000 **209├Ś1247**, 2CN002-120024 **1207├Ś342**, 2DN000-060000 **623├Ś484** ÔÇö each row shows W├ŚH + the Ôťô checkmark. Normal part 2BK002-060000 unchanged 607├Ś52 (no regression). node --check clean; 0 console errors; deploy live (curl cache-bust: marker present).
FOR e: **hard-reload the Nest tab** (Ctrl+Shift+R) ÔÇö the 3 parts will show their W├ŚH + Ôťô and nest normally (no remove / no Ôć╗ needed). Their grain still shows "?" = no grain rule for those codes yet (separate ÔÇö set via Grain table / "Default" if it matters).
RE remove button (RD's bonus Q): project (non-manual) parts have NO per-part delete by design ÔÇö to EXCLUDE one from a run, UNCHECK its checkbox (or toggle its cabinet capsule off / "None"). The row "├Ś" is the W├ŚH separator, not delete. (Moot now ÔÇö the parts work.)
FYI: nest.js touched -> other lane pull --rebase.
**NEEDS:** (optional, Fusion lane) CC_Laser fallback/sketch export path should tag cut geometry as OUTER_PROFILES instead of layer "0" ÔÇö web now tolerates it, but tagged is cleaner + keeps the tight-bbox/ignore-construction behavior.

### 2026-06-21 - G2 (WEB nest) -> e + RD: grain-direction indicator ON the part preview (fd61dbe, LIVE) ÔĆ▒ 00:30
STATUS: shipped RD's dispatch (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő) ÔÇö show grain direction on the big right-side part preview, matching the row glyph. nest.js, pathspec.
WHAT: the preview already had a faint hatch but it was ALWAYS horizontal (old 2026-05-31 sheet-centric rule "lines horizontal, rotate the part") Ôćĺ a V part (Ôöé) showed HORIZONTAL lines = read backwards vs the symbol. Now the indicator MATCHES the row glyph in screen space:
- **V (Ôöé) Ôćĺ VERTICAL** dashed hatch + ÔćĽ corner badge
- **H (ÔöÇ) Ôćĺ HORIZONTAL** dashed hatch + Ôćö badge
- **ANY (Ôť▒) Ôćĺ faint both-way grid** + ÔćĽÔćö badge
- **? Ôćĺ no hatch, small "?" badge**
Hatch = light + dashed + clipped to the silhouette (under the outline, never covers cut geometry); corner badge (arrow + letter) sits in the top-left padding so direction is unmistakable even when the hatch is faint / the part is small. `_grainHatchCanvas` rewritten direction-aware; new `_grainBadgeCanvas`. **This supersedes the old "always horizontal" rule for the part preview** (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's new ask). The placed-orientation rotation (grot) is UNTOUCHED; the remnant-thumbnail `_grainHatchSvg` left as-is (separate surface).

Each matches its row glyph. node --check clean; 0 console errors; deploy live (curl cache-bust: `_grainBadgeCanvas` present).
NB: RD's example #11 2CN000-120000 isn't in this session's 02 Ruth part list (its grain rule changed) ÔÇö verified on confirmed V/H/ANY/? parts instead; the feature is grain-driven so it works for any code.
FOR e: hard-reload Nest Ôćĺ click ­čĹü on any part Ôćĺ the preview shows grain lines + a ÔćĽ/Ôćö/ÔćĽÔćö/? badge matching the row symbol.

STATUS: shipped RD's dispatch ÔÇö 2CN002-120024 + 2CN026-120000 (grain V) had NO hatch in the preview while other V/H parts did. nest.js, pathspec.
ROOT (RD's hypothesis confirmed + one more): these are the SAME layer-"0" DXFs as the 18975c2 bbox fix ÔÇö cut paths on layer 0, boundary never stitched Ôćĺ `polys.outer` = degenerate 2-pt stray segment. The hatch was clipped to `polys.outer` Ôćĺ empty clip region Ôćĺ no hatch. PLUS the steel FILL is degenerate too (no silhouette), so even once clipped to the bbox the normal sub-pixel-thin (0.5px/0.45a) teal hatch was invisible on the bare dark canvas. (Debug proof: it was already drawing 46 lines at GÔëł66 ÔÇö below perception.)
FIX (2 parts): (1) run the hatch independently of the outer block; clip to the real closed outer loop when present, else fall back to the drawn bbox (mirrors 18975c2). (2) draw the hatch BOLDER (1.1px / 0.5a) when there's no steel fill behind it; parts WITH a proper outer keep the subtle 0.5px/0.45a hatch on their steel fill ÔÇö UNCHANGED. Still always-horizontal, H/V only (post-revert behaviour ÔÇö did NOT re-introduce the reverted direction/badge).
VERIFY (live preview, 02 Ruth, admin): 2CN002-120024 + 2CN026-120000 (V) now show horizontal hatch (screenshot confirms + column scan hatch-runs 2 Ôćĺ 7-10, anti-alias undercounts the rest); a normal part unchanged; 0 console errors; node --check clean; deploy live (curl cache-bust marker present). Temp debug hooks added during diagnosis were removed before commit.
FOR e: hard-reload Nest Ôćĺ 2CN002-120024 / 2CN026-120000 (and any other layer-0 V/H part) now show grain hatch in the preview.

A genuinely CONCAVE layer-0 part (notch/L) would have the hull bridge the concavity Ôćĺ minor fill overflow there; none of the flagged parts are concave. ### 2026-06-21 - G2 (WEB) -> RD 05 + e: mindmap editor keeps viewport + node positions on background updates (d9a5e10, LIVE) ÔĆ▒ 00:20
Shipped RD 05's "ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ update/refresh Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞäÓŞçÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣ëÓŞ▓+ÓŞĽÓŞ│Ó╣üÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣łÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞüÓŞúÓŞ░Ó╣éÓŞöÓŞöÓ╣äÓŞŤÓŞíÓŞ▓" ÔÇö the React Flow editor no longer jumps on a background tick. app.js only (no editor/bundle change).
ROOT: `_refreshAssemblyUI` already did an in-place delta (pills + kme:extsync) when the editor is live, but the ~20 OTHER background callers go straight to `_backgroundRender()` Ôćĺ `render()`, which rebuilds ROOT.innerHTML Ôćĺ destroys #kme-mount Ôćĺ the editor REMOUNTS (radial layout re-runs + fitView/defaultViewport re-apply) Ôćĺ pan/zoom + dragged node positions jump back. RTDB listeners, the NEW-badge poll, Fusion-save sync, NO-PDF chip flips all hit this.
FIX: one guard at the top of `_backgroundRender` ÔÇö when a project view has a live editor (`window.__kmeInstance` + `#kme-mount`), do the SAME in-place delta (`_updateProgressPills` + dispatch `kme:extsync`, which re-reads badge/chip/assembled state on the EXISTING nodes ÔÇö no viewport touch) and RETURN before the rebuild. Covers every direct caller present + future; the editor keeps its EXACT viewport AND node positions. Non-editor surfaces still get the normal scroll-preserving render. (The editor already caches viewport in `_vpCache`/onMoveEnd + fitView only on first open ÔÇö this stops the remount that was bypassing all that.)
VERIFY (live preview, 02 Ruth, editor mounted): marked ROOT children Ôćĺ called the REAL `_backgroundRender` Ôćĺ #kme-mount + .kme-mount-host + .project-summary-row ALL survive as the SAME elements (no rebuild/remount) AND kme:extsync fires once (delta still applies in place). node --check clean; 0 console errors; deploy live (curl marker present).
FOR e: pan/zoom anywhere in the mindmap Ôćĺ a Fusion save / NEW badge / pdf chip / any auto-refresh will NOT move the canvas anymore; badges/chips still update in place.
NB: same discipline as [[reference_background_render_guard]] (nest/library) ÔÇö now extended to the editor. Structural changes (a brand-NEW part node arriving) still need a manifest re-derive; this covers the state-delta refreshes RD listed (badge/chip/assembled/Fusion-save).
**NEEDS:** nothing.

### 2026-06-21 - G2 (WEB nest) -> RD 05 + e: layer-0 fill now clipped to EXACT stitched outline ÔÇö no bleed at notches (2450641, LIVE) ÔĆ▒ 00:30

ROOT: f26ddcb used a CONVEX HULL as the fill/clip silhouette ÔÇö but these parts are CONCAVE, so the hull bridges the notches Ôćĺ fill spilled into them.
FIX: rebuild the EXACT outline, not a hull. The boundary is fragmented (open LINE/ARC/SPLINE) mixed with small closed CIRCLE holes ÔÇö that mix is why the parser's stitch originally failed. So: **drop the small closed loops (holes, area < 5% of bbox) and STITCH the remaining open boundary segments into one closed loop** (new `_stitchLoop`, same algorithm as `_extractPolygons`). That loop FOLLOWS the concave notches; FILL + hatch clip to it Ôćĺ nothing past the perimeter. Convex hull kept ONLY as a last-resort fallback if stitching can't close. Proper-outer parts unchanged.
VERIFY (live preview, 02 Ruth, admin): stitch closes for both ÔÇö 2CN002 boundary 34 segs (25 holes dropped), 2CN026 90 segs (32 dropped); **stitched area < convex-hull area for both** (406964<410383, 243647<249030) = the silhouette is provably CONCAVE (it follows the notches ÔÇö the area gap IS the notch the hull wrongly filled), and the fill is `ctx.clip()`-ed to it so it physically cannot bleed. Both render filled+outlined end-to-end (faintFill 115k/66k, outline 3197/1927). node --check clean; 0 console errors; deploy live (curl `_stitchLoop` present).
NB: the preview screenshot tool was unavailable this session, so I verified at the notches via the geometric proof (stitch closes + stitched-area < hull-area = concave outline) + the clip path, rather than a pixel screenshot. If Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő still sees ANY green past the cyan line on a specific part, send that code ÔÇö a part whose boundary doesn't stitch (gap > 3mm) would fall back to the hull and could still bleed; I'd then widen the stitch tol or tag it.

### 2026-06-21 - G2 (WEB 18) -> RD 05 + e: mindmap STILL-JUMPS root cause = minZoom clamp ÔÇö FIXED+LIVE (d01f516) ÔĆ▒ 00:40
RD 05 relayed Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "mindmap ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓŞüÓŞúÓŞ░Ó╣éÓŞöÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣ł" despite 6544b7e. **REPRODUCED in preview (not guessed)** Ôćĺ root cause is NOT a stray render() and NOT structural reflow ÔÇö it's a **zoom CLAMP on viewport restore**:
- editor had `minZoom={0.25}` but `fitViewOptions.minZoom={0.1}` (desktop). So fitView legitimately fits a big tree (03 Ruth = 83 nodes) at **~0.13** and onMoveEnd SAVES 0.13 ÔÇö but on every background REMOUNT, React Flow clamps `defaultViewport`'s zoom UP to the component floor 0.25 Ôćĺ canvas snapped **0.13Ôćĺ0.25** (pan kept, ZOOM jumped). 6544b7e saved/restored the vp correctly; the restore was silently clamped. Fires on ANY remount regardless of trigger.
- PROOF (preview, 03 Ruth, real pan + raw render() remount): BEFORE Ôćĺ remount left scale(0.25); AFTER fix Ôćĺ remount preserves EXACT `translate(384.248,686.559) scale(0.129913)`, vpFullyPreserved=true, zoom 0.129913Ôćĺ0.129913. 0 console errors.
FIX: `minZoom = desktop 0.1 (= fit's own min Ôćĺ saved 0.13 restores exactly) / mobile 0.25 (its fit min is 0.6 Ôëź 0.25 Ôćĺ never clamped; 0.25 keeps phone pinch-out)`. One-line, in editor/main.jsx + rebuilt bundle.
deploy 27890934686 success; live editor.bundle.js MD5 == local (fix is live).
FOR e: hard-reload the mindmap, zoom way out to see the whole tree, then trigger a refresh (Fusion save / mark complete / etc.) ÔÇö the view should now STAY at your zoom, no snap-in.
NB (separate, lower pri): a raw render() still REMOUNTS the editor (brief repaint) ÔÇö now viewport-stable so no jump, but if Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő still sees a flicker on some trigger, the follow-up is routing the remaining background raw-render() callers (timers/comments listeners per memory) through _refreshAssemblyUI/extsync so they don't remount at all. The zoom-jump (the actual "ÓŞüÓŞúÓŞ░Ó╣éÓŞöÓŞö") is fixed.

### 2026-06-21 - G2 (WEB 18) -> RD 05 + e: mindmap Ctrl+Shift+R viewport-reset ÔÇö onInit force-restore SHIPPED (f9de01a, LIVE) ÔĆ▒ 00:25

Editor reopens with all nodes (ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜ) but the VIEWPORT snaps to a fresh fitView (root tiny, kids scattered) instead of where Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő left it. This is the reload-restore REPOPULATE path my earlier remount/structural repros couldn't reach (the empty-editor-on-reload preview artifact = exactly this path).
ROOT: on the cold repopulate (empty-first-mount Ôćĺ nodes fill) React Flow's fitView can WIN over the saved `kme_vp_<pk>` before the vp settles ÔÇö so `fitView={!_vpGet}` + `defaultViewport` alone don't hold.
FIX (editor/main.jsx, RD's prescription): added `onInit` that force-applies `_vpGet(projectKey)` right after init (+ once more next animation frame, in case a fit settles late) Ôćĺ a saved vp ALWAYS beats fitView on every mount/repopulate; true first-ever-open (no saved vp) untouched (onInit is a no-op then).
VERIFIED (preview, 03 Ruth, 0 console err): seeded a DISTINCT non-fit vp {zoom:1.7} Ôćĺ editor opens at EXACTLY scale(1.7) (not a ~0.3 fit) = saved vp beats fitView; remount preserves; first-open unaffected. ÔÜá The actual cold-reload re-fit CAN'T be reproduced in preview (empty-editor artifact is that very path) ÔÇö so the onInit force-restore is the fix-by-construction; deploy 27899154119 success, live bundle MD5 == local.

### 2026-06-21 - G2 (WEB 18) -> RD 05 + e: Ctrl+Shift+R "ÓŞäÓŞçÓŞúÓŞ╣ÓŞŤÓ╣üÓŞúÓŞü" = SCROLL bounce (not viewport) ÔÇö FIXED+LIVE (d208ae9) ÔĆ▒ 00:45
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's 2 screenshots + her answer ("ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓ╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞäÓŞçÓŞúÓŞ╣ÓŞŤÓ╣üÓŞúÓŞüÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞŤÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞÖ") REFRAMED it AGAIN: the jump = the page SCROLLS from ┬ž3 Mindmap (where she was) up to ┬ž1 Kanban on Ctrl+Shift+R. NOT the React Flow viewport (my onInit fix f9de01a was a real-but-different issue; kept).
ROOT CAUSE (reproduced, numeric): the Assembly/Mindmap page scrolls INSIDE an overflow container **`.kme-assembly-shell`** (scrollHeight 2665 / clientHeight 900), NOT the window ÔÇö `window.scrollY` is ALWAYS 0 there. So the existing reload scroll-restore stashed `window.scrollY` (=0) + called `window.scrollTo(0,0)` = a NO-OP Ôćĺ every reload landed at the top (Kanban). That's why no viewport repro ever showed it.
FIX (app.js): (1) `__kdBeforeReload` now ALSO stashes `.kme-assembly-shell`.scrollTop (`assemblyScroll`). (2) On reload-restore, a stability-aware restorer waits for the shell to lazy-mount + its scrollHeight to SETTLE (unchanged ~400ms) + be tall enough, then applies the saved scrollTop ONCE and stops (settling first avoids clamping to an intermediate height as the editor fills; one-shot so it never fights a user scroll).
VERIFIED (preview 1280x900, 03 Ruth, real `window.location.reload()`): scrolled shell to 1599 (┬ž3 Mindmap) Ôćĺ reload + editor repopulate Ôćĺ shell restored to **EXACTLY 1599 and held** (restoredOK=true). Debugged the path: stash captures assemblyScroll Ôťô, restore nav=true Ôťô, earlier 0/1329 results were preview empty-mount + mid-growth-clamp artifacts, fixed by the settle-wait. deploy 27900071201 success; live markers 8.
**NEEDS ÔÇö Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő:** scroll to the Mindmap Ôćĺ Ctrl+Shift+R Ôćĺ should STAY at the Mindmap now (not jump to Kanban). -- G2 (WEB 18)

### 2026-06-21 - G2 (WEB 18) -> RD 05 + e: blank = empty-editor-on-reload (REAL, not my scroll) ÔÇö investigating; WORKAROUND confirmed
Revert of the scroll fix did NOT clear Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's blank Ôćĺ the blank is the **empty-editor-on-reload**, a real bug on her device (I wrongly closed it earlier as preview-only). Reproduced + narrowed in preview:
- On a hard reload: editor bundle LOADED (`KitchenMindmapEditor`=object), `#kme-mount` present, `__kmeInstance` true ÔÇö **the editor DID mount, but with 0 `.react-flow__node`, and stays 0** (sampled 0Ôćĺ3.6s).
- Manifest data IS present at reload (`manifest.projects['03 Ruth'].parts` = 64). So NOT a bundle race + NOT missing data Ôćĺ a MOUNT-TIMING bug (the reload-mount builds 0 nodes; a fresh open builds 83).
- **WORKAROUND (confirmed, un-blocks Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő now):** navigate away (Library tab) Ôćĺ back to Projects Ôćĺ reopen 03 Ruth = a FRESH renderProject Ôćĺ **83 nodes, populated.** Only the reload-restore path mounts empty.
Running a parallel root-cause workflow (mount path / repopulate fallback / editor-internal / init-data-readiness) to pin the exact dependency that's ready on a fresh open but not at the reload-mount, then a fix that GUARANTEES populate after reload (likely: re-render the project once after the restore, like the workaround). Will ship + verify (assert .react-flow__node appears after reload with NO manual rerender).
**NEEDS ÔÇö Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő:** Ó╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ë workaround Ó╣äÓŞŤÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ (ÓŞ¬ÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓ╣üÓŞŚÓ╣çÓŞÜÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞö 03 Ruth Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł) ÔÇö Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç Ctrl+Shift+R ÓŞłÓŞÖÓŞüÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞťÓŞíÓŞłÓŞ░Ó╣üÓŞüÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞ¬ÓŞúÓ╣çÓŞł. -- G2 (WEB 18)

### 2026-06-21 - G2 (WEB 18) -> RD 05 + e: BLANK mindmap on reload ÔÇö ROOT-CAUSED + FIXED (1ac4ae9, LIVE) ÔĆ▒ ~01:00
The "ÓŞłÓŞşÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞç" was NOT my scroll fix (revert didn't help) ÔÇö it's **empty-editor-on-reload** (I wrongly closed it earlier as preview-only; it's REAL). Root-caused with a 5-agent parallel workflow + preview repro. TWO failure modes:
1. **COLD-SOCKET HANG (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's device):** the editor `mount()` is gated behind two pre-mount Firebase reads (`_loadCustomMindmap`+`_loadOverrides`, app.js~10705) doing `.once('value')`. On a cold reload the RTDB socket is still connecting Ôćĺ `.once()` PENDS forever (never resolves/rejects) Ôćĺ the `await` hangs Ôćĺ mount() never runs Ôćĺ blank. Fresh open works = warm socket.
2. **MOUNT RACE (preview, warm socket):** the async mount is clobbered mid-flight by init-time RTDB listeners firing `_refreshAssemblyUIÔćĺ_backgroundRenderÔćĺrender()`, which rebuilds ROOT + starts a 2nd competing mount Ôćĺ 0 nodes.
FIX (app.js only, no editor build): (a) time-bound both pre-mount reads (race `.once()` vs 1.5s Ôćĺ fall back to LS, mirror late value) so mount() ALWAYS runs; (b) monotonic mount token `__kmeMountSeq` ÔÇö only the latest renderProject's mount wins, stale ones bail; (c) `__kmeMountDone` pending-flag ÔÇö `_refreshAssemblyUI`/`_backgroundRender` SKIP the destructive render while a mount is in flight; (d) 2.5s watchdog (capped) re-renders once if still empty.
VERIFIED (preview, 03 Ruth, 0 console err): reload now **SELF-populates 83 nodes from ms=0, NO manual rerender** (was 0 forever); with RTDB reads stubbed to pend forever (cold-socket sim) the editor STILL mounts at ~1.7s via the timeoutÔćĺLS; fresh open still 83 (no regression). deploy 27900999293 success; live markers 9.
**NEEDS ÔÇö Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő:** Ctrl+Shift+R the mindmap now Ôćĺ should load the parts/mindmap (NOT blank). (Scroll-keep is reverted for now ÔÇö I'll redo it cleanly on top of this once the blank is confirmed gone.) -- G2 (WEB 18)

### 2026-06-22 - Fusion 31 -> RD 05 + Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: TASK 2 DONE (housekeeping 98e70a2, local) + TASK 1 FEASIBILITY REPORT (recommend STLÔćĺtrimeshÔćĺGLB; building PENDING approval)
**TASK 2 ÔÇö DONE** (_MASTERS 98e70a2, local-only per instruction): swept 8 modified files in ONE commit ÔÇö sampled the diffs to confirm all intentional:
- `CC_Auto/palette/style.css` +43 Ôćĺ CC_Diff per-category compare checkboxes (G3 06-09).
- `CC_CheckBend/CC_CheckBend_action.py` +303, `box_model.py` +13 Ôćĺ lips-asc/walls-desc bend-order rule (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő 06-05 'lip ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞťÓŞÖÓŞ▒ÓŞç' + 2-wall-side flip).
- `CC_CheckHoles/CC_CheckHoles_action.py` +26, `CC_LinkNode.py` +8 (two-tone beep parity), `CC_RenameTo13Digits.py` / `CC_Switch.py` (~340 / ~240 net deletions = production refactors), `standards/Stainless_Specs_v2.xlsx` (binary spec bump).

**TASK 1 ÔÇö FEASIBILITY REPORT (PoC verified, recommendation below ÔÇö awaiting GO before building):**
**RECOMMEND PATH: Fusion ExportManager Ôćĺ STL Ôćĺ trimesh Ôćĺ GLB.** Smallest, fastest, fully local; no APS credits, no cloud round-trip.
- **Why not APS Model Derivative**: async job (poll for minutes), eats APS credits per export, requires re-uploading the design, network-bound; massive overkill for ~15 cabinets/project.
- **Why STL over OBJ/STEP/3MF**: Fusion's STL writer is the fastest of the four + accepts a single Component target (geom=cabinet wrapper) Ôćĺ one STL per cabinet flattened. OBJ would preserve per-body groups (useful only if we add per-leaf picking ÔÇö see Q3 below).
- **Stack already 80% present**: numpy 2.4.4 Ôťô, Pillow 12.2.0 Ôťô; trimesh just `pip install`d cleanly (v4.12.2, pure-Python on numpy, ~5MB install, zero native deps for STL/OBJÔćĺGLB). No Blender / no APS / no compiled extensions.
- **PoC verified just now** (outside Fusion): synthetic cabinet = 3 boxes (800├Ś600├Ś600 mm) Ôćĺ 24 verts/36 faces Ôćĺ STL 1884 B Ôćĺ GLB 1432 B (binary glTF 24% smaller than ASCII STL) Ôćĺ round-trip read clean.
- **File-size estimate for a real cabinet**: walk a typical 02 Ruth cabinet (~10-25 leaf bodies, flat sheet-metal at MeshRefinementMedium Ôëł ~50 triangles per body) Ôćĺ ~500-2000 KB GLB; curve-heavy cabinets (radii, embossed) maybe 5-10 MB. jsdelivr serves <50MB per file easily, but repo size = the real concern (see Q4).
- **Web contract honored exactly**: `Drawings/3d/<code>.glb` (code = cabinet wrapper / variant_root), single file per cabinet, served via jsdelivr (no Pages CORS issue), graceful 404 already handled WEB-side per 7d4013c spec.

**PROPOSED BUILD (do AFTER you greenlight ÔÇö sketch only):** new isolated add-in `_MASTERS/fusion_scripts/CC_Export3D/` (failure-domain isolation, same pattern as CC_AutoSyncOnSave). Card on CC_Auto + ribbon button "­čžŐ Export 3D". Reuses CC_Assembly's existing cabinet-wrapper enumeration (`variant_root` / `is_wrapper` from manifest), so no scanner rewrite. One pass per cabinet: `exportMgr.createSTLExportOptions(wrapper_component, tmp.stl)` Ôćĺ `exportMgr.execute(opts)` Ôćĺ `trimesh.load(tmp.stl).export('drawings-ui/Drawings/3d/<code>.glb')` Ôćĺ write `glb_exported_at` stamp into manifest.json (web can light a "3D ready" chip on cards, mirror the drawing-chip pattern). Mode picker = ACTIVE cabinet / all changed since stamp / all cabinets. Git push at end (one bundled commit, never mid-loop).

**OPEN QUESTIONS ÔÇö please decide before I build:**
1. **Trigger**: button-only (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő taps ­čžŐ when she wants 3D refreshed) OR also auto-sync-on-save extension (CC_AutoSyncOnSave fires CC_Export3D for cabinets whose model_version bumped ÔÇö keeps 3D fresh automatically, like the manifest)? Phase-1 leans button-only (cheaper, no save-path risk) ÔÇö confirm.
2. **Mesh refinement**: Low (fast, faceted edges visible ÔÇö fine for assemblers), Medium (default, smooth on standard radii), High (slow, smooth on every curve, larger files). Default Medium unless you say otherwise.
3. **Per-cabinet single mesh** (current plan) OR **per-leaf GLB nodes** (allow model-viewer to toggle individual parts visible)? Per-leaf adds work (loop per body, OBJ groups Ôćĺ trimesh.Scene with named nodes, bigger GLBs); Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's ask was "ÓŞźÓŞíÓŞŞÓŞÖÓŞöÓŞ╣" (rotate/view) Ôćĺ single mesh covers it. Confirm phase-1 = single mesh.
4. **GIT LFS vs branch vs releases**: ~50-100MB of GLBs across all projects will inflate drawings-ui (currently small). Options: (a) commit as plain blobs (simplest, ships through jsdelivr fine, but bloats clones), (b) git LFS (jsdelivr supports LFS), (c) separate orphan branch `3d-models` served via jsdelivr `@3d-models`. Recommend (a) for v1, revisit if repo passes ~500MB.

PENDING your GO + answers to 1-4 ÔÇö will build CC_Export3D + a smoke test cabinet (will demo on one 02 Ruth cabinet first) before mass export. ÔĆ▒ 00:32 -- Fusion 31

### 2026-06-22 - Fusion 31 -> RD 05 + Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő + WEB 20: CC_Export3D BUILT (_MASTERS f9fbe5b + CC_Auto catalog) ÔÇö READY FOR SMOKE TEST, needs Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő to fire it once
**Built per the GREEN-LIGHT** (Q1 button-only, Q2 LOW mesh refinement, Q3 per-leaf nodes, Q4 plain repo blobs).
**Files** (4, `_MASTERS f9fbe5b` local):
- `_MASTERS/fusion_scripts/CC_Export3D/CC_Export3D.py` ÔÇö Fusion side: walks the active design's visible occurrences with body geometry, binary STL per leaf at LOW mesh refinement (geometry=Occurrence so world transforms bake in), then subprocess-out to system Python with a JSON manifest.
- `_MASTERS/fusion_scripts/CC_Export3D/_stl_to_glb.py` ÔÇö system-Python helper (Fusion's bundled Python lacks trimesh; bolting it on breaks Fusion). Loads each STL, dedups duplicate names, drops empty bodies, builds `trimesh.Scene` with one named geometry per leaf, writes `drawings-ui/Drawings/3d/<code>.glb`. 5 exit codes; partial-success = code 4 (Fusion side still treats it as success).
- `_MASTERS/fusion_scripts/CC_Export3D/README.md` ÔÇö Q-decision matrix + the system-Python override env var (`CC_EXPORT3D_PYTHON`).
- `CC_Auto.py` SCRIPTS catalog: new entry "­čžŐ Export 3D" (invoke=script). Per `feedback_cc_auto_ribbon_mirror` this auto-mirrors to a UTILITIES ribbon button on next palette reload ÔÇö no ribbon code added.
**Wiring decisions:**
- Cabinet code resolved via `scanner.resolve_active_code(design, doc_name)` ÔÇö the SAME shared resolver CC_Assembly and CC_Laser already delegate to (RD09 2026-06-20). So a configured master keys under its active row name, never the file name.
- Push via the existing `sync_helper.trigger_sync()` (detached `sync.bat`). Same pipe CC_Assembly uses; jsdelivr refresh ~1-2 min after the push lands.
- NEVER calls `doc.save()` (standing Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő rule). Reads the active design only.
- `glb_exported_at` manifest stamp deferred ÔÇö web's HEAD-check / model-viewer error event already drives the placeholder, so file presence on jsdelivr IS the "3D ready" signal. WEB 20 just shipped ­čžŐ on Kanban headers + part rows too (539d9a8) ÔÇö every surface keys off the same code. If WEB 20 wants the chip without a HEAD round-trip, ping back and I'll add a top-level `manifest.glb_exported` dict.
**VERIFIED (outside Fusion):**
- `py_compile` PASS on both Python files + CC_Auto edit.
- Standalone helper PASS end-to-end: 3 synthetic box STLs Ôćĺ 3-node GLB 3.4 KB, all 3 named nodes round-trip (`trimesh.load` shows `['back_panel', 'side_left', 'top_shelf']`).
- Earlier feasibility PoC PASS: STLÔćĺGLB 1.9 KB Ôćĺ 1.4 KB, geometry intact.
