RE Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ export Ó╣üÓŞÜÓŞÜ batch Ó╣äÓŞöÓ╣ëÓ╣äÓŞźÓŞí": Ó╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë ÔÇö Ó╣üÓŞąÓŞ░ÓŞłÓŞ│Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣üÓŞüÓ╣ëÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖ Ó╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞúÓŞ▓ÓŞ░ **batch path Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí (CC_BatchExport3D Ôćĺ cabinet_inv) ÓŞüÓ╣çÓŞ×ÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ**. cabinet_inv = inverse ÓŞĽÓŞ▒ÓŞžÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞžÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü body ÓŞÜÓŞÖ STL ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ component-LOCAL Ôćĺ ÓŞŤÓŞúÓŞ░ÓŞüÓŞşÓŞÜÓŞŐÓŞ┤Ó╣ëÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞäÓŞÖÓŞąÓŞ░ frame Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë (geometry ÓŞťÓŞ┤ÓŞö). round-16 Ó╣üÓŞüÓ╣ëÓ╣üÓŞäÓ╣ł path ÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞž (root); cabinet/part targets ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ëÓŞéÓŞşÓŞçÓŞ×ÓŞ▒ÓŞç.

PROVEN (live 100VO0): sub-component `allOccurrences` proxy transform2 ÓŞŤÓŞúÓŞ░ÓŞüÓŞşÓŞÜ 41 ÓŞŐÓŞ┤Ó╣ëÓŞÖ = **930├Ś573.6├Ś81.0mm == ground truth 0.00mm**. extent Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ translation-invariant Ôćĺ ÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞ¬ÓŞ╣ÓŞłÓŞÖÓ╣îÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ `Component.allOccurrences` transform2 ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣âÓŞÖ frame ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç component ÓŞÖÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓŞç (cabinet-local ÓŞ¬ÓŞ│ÓŞźÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ cabinet target) Ôćĺ `_collect_leaf_bodies_world(cabinet_comp)` Ó╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ëÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç cabinet_inv.

## [2026-06-22 18:20] Group 2 (Web) -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő + Fusion 33
STATUS: 3D viewer (app.js kd3d) - part-label colour/weight + parts-browser unmatched-part fix. DONE.

TASK A (labels): label text now follows the mode background - BLACK on light bg
(compcolor; sketch-theme hidden/hiddenshade), WHITE on dark bg (realistic/explode/
dark hidden). Weight = regular (was bold gold #F2A93B). New helper `_labelColorsForMode()`
(app.js ~2950) drives `ctx.fillStyle`/`strokeStyle` in the sprite-canvas builder
(app.js ~3035-3060). Labels rebuild via `applyMode` -> `_buildExplodeLabels`, so a
mode switch regenerates them with the right colour.

TASK B (parts browser - 1NNV04-06000L): ROOT CAUSE = matcher, not missing geometry
(GLB has all 32 nodes). `_extractPartLabel` (a) only stripped `_v13` not the ` v13`
SPACE version-suffix Fusion bakes into node names, and (b) returned '' for any node
whose component has no '-'. Those '' nodes fell back to a synthetic "Part N" label,
but the highlighter filtered by `_extractPartLabel(node)===label` -> '' never equals
"Part N" -> clicking/ticking the row did NOTHING. Fix:
 - `_extractPartLabel` strips `[ _]v\d+$` (space OR underscore, case-insensitive) so
   `FN2BNX-060000 v13__Body3` -> `FN2BNX-060000`; rows now consolidate all
   `<code>__...` nodes (incl. _2/_3 dups + instanced xN) into one row.
 - Highlight is now by NODE IDENTITY: new `_highlightUnits(label, units, ...)` tints
   the row's own scene nodes, so flagged "Part N" rows highlight too. `_highlightCode`
   kept as a thin resolver for the raycast click-to-identify path.
 - Un-parseable rows get a RED frame (`.kd3d-unmatched` = border:1px solid #e5484d).
   They stay VISIBLE + clickable per Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞľÓŞ╣ÓŞüÓŞĽÓŞ┤Ó╣ŐÓŞüÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓ╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣îÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖÓŞüÓŞúÓŞşÓŞÜÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖÓŞ¬ÓŞÁÓ╣üÓŞöÓŞç".

Edited app.js ONLY (no CC_*/nest.js/editor touched). node --check OK. regex unit-tested.
WebGL does not render in headless preview - Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő verify on live site.
**NEEDS:** nothing from Fusion. FYI only.

- applyComponentColors ownerKey: `mesh.name` Ôćĺ `_extractPartLabel(mesh.name)` (bare code, reuse helper ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü 5e8209c) Ôćĺ same code = same colour (BXXTR0-000000 x4 Ôćĺ ÓŞ¬ÓŞÁÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞž). Fallback = node/parent name Ó╣ÇÓŞíÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞş parse code Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë.
- applyMaterials: explode Ôćĺ applyComponentColors (Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖ compcolor) Ó╣üÓŞŚÓŞÖ material Ó╣ÇÓŞŚÓŞ▓.
- CSS: explode bg Ôćĺ #f3f4f6 (ÓŞóÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞóÓŞşÓŞşÓŞüÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü dark rule) ; edges Ôćĺ black solid Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖ compcolor.
- _labelColorsForMode: explode Ôćĺ lightBg Ôćĺ label ÓŞ¬ÓŞÁÓŞöÓŞ│ (ÓŞ¬ÓŞşÓŞöÓŞäÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç bg Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł).

ÓŞŚÓŞ┤Ó╣ëÓŞç sprite ÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ overlay 2D ÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ model-viewer (commit dfb2850):
- overlay `<div>` (pointer-events:none, z-index 3) ÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ .kd3d-viewer: ÓŞäÓŞşÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞíÓŞÖÓ╣î text ÓŞőÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞó+ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓ (flex column) ÓŞŤÓŞ▒ÓŞüÓŞéÓŞşÓŞÜÓŞőÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞó/ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓ + 1 `<svg>` layer ÓŞ¬ÓŞ│ÓŞźÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓ╣ÇÓŞ¬Ó╣ëÓŞÖÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ë.
- 1 row ÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞş 1 code = "N x CODE" (qty ÓŞźÓŞÖÓŞ▓/Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞŹÓ╣łÓŞüÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓, code ÓŞŤÓŞüÓŞĽÓŞ┤) ÓŞéÓŞÖÓŞ▓ÓŞöÓŞäÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞÜÓŞÖÓŞłÓŞş. rows Ó╣âÓŞÖ flex column Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓŞç = Ó╣üÓŞüÓ╣ë "label ÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ".
- ÓŞőÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞó/ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓ + ÓŞąÓŞ│ÓŞöÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ Y ÓŞüÓŞ│ÓŞźÓŞÖÓŞö **ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞž** ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ explode (project assembled centroid Ôćĺ screen, fallback = gx/gy split) Ôćĺ labels ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞÖÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞç Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł re-sort ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞźÓŞíÓŞŞÓŞÖ/Ó╣üÓŞĽÓŞü.
- part-end ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞ¬Ó╣ëÓŞÖÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ë track ÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó model-viewer **hotspot slot** (1 ÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞş code, data-position = centroid ÓŞŤÓŞ▒ÓŞłÓŞłÓŞŞÓŞÜÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü applyExplode math: gx+(gx-center)*factor) Ôćĺ ÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ getBoundingClientRect Ôćĺ SVG `<line>` ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓŞéÓŞşÓŞÜ row ÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓ╣âÓŞÖÓ╣äÓŞŤÓŞłÓŞŞÓŞö part + arrowhead (SVG marker) ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł part. Ó╣ÇÓŞ¬Ó╣ëÓŞÖÓŞşÓŞşÓŞüÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞźÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓Ó╣éÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞą Ôćĺ Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ text.
- redraw ÓŞÜÓŞÖ `camera-change` + slider (RAF throttle) + resize/fullscreen; Ó╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣îÓ╣ÇÓŞëÓŞ×ÓŞ▓ÓŞ░ explode > 5%; teardown ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞö modal/Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ mode (ÓŞąÓŞÜ hotspot slots + listeners).
Ó╣üÓŞüÓ╣ë app.js Ó╣ÇÓŞŚÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞÖ (CSS overlay ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣âÓŞÖ STYLE block ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç app.js ÓŞĽÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł .kd3d-modal rules ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣ł ÔÇö Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣üÓŞĽÓŞ░ style.css). node --check OK. Deploy success (dfb2850, marker live ÓŞÜÓŞÖ Pages).

Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő verify ÓŞÜÓŞÖ iPad/live: Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞöÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç Ôćĺ Explode Ôćĺ ÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞü slider Ôćĺ labels ÓŞÖÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞçÓŞőÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞó/ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓, Ó╣ÇÓŞ¬Ó╣ëÓŞÖÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ëÓŞĽÓŞ▓ÓŞí part, Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞáÓŞ▓ÓŞ×/Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ.

Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő verify ÓŞÜÓŞÖ live (ÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü dfb2850 overlay): column labels Ó╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣î Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣ł **Ó╣ÇÓŞ¬Ó╣ëÓŞÖÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ë+ÓŞąÓŞ╣ÓŞüÓŞĘÓŞúÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖ**. Root cause: hotspot slot ÓŞĽÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç `display:none` Ôćĺ getBoundingClientRect = all-zero Ôćĺ `_updateExplodeLeaders` ÓŞíÓŞşÓŞçÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ off-screen Ôćĺ ÓŞőÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü leader (stroke-opacity 0). Fix 2 ÓŞłÓŞŞÓŞö:
- hotspot `display:none` Ôćĺ `visibility:hidden` (0├Ś0 box ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓŞ×ÓŞü transform ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç model-viewer Ôćĺ rect.left/top = ÓŞłÓŞŞÓŞö part ÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç).
- + fallback: ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ hotspot rect Ó╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ëÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë Ôćĺ project centroid ÓŞťÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ THREE camera (`_projectToViewer`, Ó╣ÇÓŞüÓ╣çÓŞÜ `_ovlThree` ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖ build) Ôćĺ leader ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓŞžÓŞ▓ÓŞöÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ëÓ╣üÓŞíÓ╣ë hotspot ÓŞçÓŞşÓ╣üÓŞç.

### 2026-06-22 - RD HANDOFF (session close ÔÇö Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő Ó╣äÓŞŤ session ÓŞşÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞÖÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞş)

- 3D explode Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞöÓŞíÓŞ▓ **ÓŞŤÓŞúÓŞ░ÓŞüÓŞşÓŞÜÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł 0%** (Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓŞ┤ÓŞü auto-explode) ÔÇö Ó╣üÓŞĽÓŞüÓ╣ÇÓŞëÓŞ×ÓŞ▓ÓŞ░ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞü slider

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-22 ┬Ě 3D explode labels ÔÇö auto side + horizontal leaders to part edge (688b846, LIVE)
**WHAT:** Rewrote explode-mode part-label placement in `app.js` (`_layoutOverlayRows` + `_updateExplodeLeaders`, rows now absolute not flex columns).
- Label seats at its part's **mid-height** Ôćĺ leader is a **horizontal** line; label auto-picks **LEFT/RIGHT** by the part's screen-X (small hysteresis + fresh side on reappear); on orbit labels run up/down + swap sides.
- **No crossing / no overlap:** per-side sort-by-part-Y + push-apart (uniform-shift overflow Ôćĺ provably no overlap); generous spacing.
- **Arrow on part's NEAR silhouette EDGE at mid-height** (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞąÓŞ╣ÓŞüÓŞĘÓŞúÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞüÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞç+ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞÜÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç Part") via `Box3.setFromObject` world AABB Ôćĺ project 8 corners through model-viewer's THREE camera. **Cross-checked vs the proven hotspot centroid** Ôćĺ if projection space disagrees / no camera, falls back to centroid pointing (never regresses below the screenshot Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő accepted).
- Behind-camera parts Ôćĺ no leader; off-screen labels hidden; leader suppressed if part edge falls inside the label band (no text overlap). Removed top/left/right CSS transition (was reading mid-anim rects).
**WHY:** Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő rapid feedback 2026-06-22 ÔÇö leaders were crossing/tangling; wanted labels to move up/down + side auto, horizontal leaders, arrow on edge.
**VERIFY:** `node --check` OK; 3-lens adversarial static review (workflow) ran first, all major findings fixed; deploy watched to success, live app.js confirms marker. **Live 3D tracking = Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő verifies on iPad (WebGL not testable headless).**
**NEXT:** Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő eyeball on 2FNLR0 / 1NNV04 explode Ôćĺ iterate if edge/side off.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-22 ┬Ě explode arrow Ôćĺ on the part edge at mid-height (929dfd9, LIVE)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞąÓŞ╣ÓŞüÓŞĘÓŞúÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞ¬Ó╣ëÓŞÖÓŞéÓŞşÓŞÜÓ╣ÇÓŞŚÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞÖ Ó╣üÓŞąÓŞ░ÓŞąÓŞ╣ÓŞüÓŞĘÓŞúÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓ╣łÓŞ▓Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣î": replaced AABB X-extent (stray corner floated in empty space) with **box-silhouette Ôłę horizontal line at the centroid screen-Y** Ôćĺ arrow sits exactly on the part's near edge at mid-height; scanline-misses-box Ôćĺ no arrow; outer-edge guard 2Ôćĺ8px (no stub bare-arrows). node --check OK, deploy watched LIVE. Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő eyeball next.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-22 ┬Ě explode arrows floated Ôćĺ fixed via model-viewer corner hotspots (9dc1577, LIVE)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő screenshot: arrows pointed into EMPTY space (only near-centre parts landed). ROOT CAUSE: our own THREE-camera projection (`_findCamera` + `.project`) drifts in SCALE vs model-viewer's actual render Ôćĺ edges radiate outward from centre into the margin. FIX: drop THREE projection for the edge; place **8 bbox-corner hotspots per part** so model-viewer projects them exactly where rendered; read their rects Ôćĺ silhouette Ôłę horizontal line at centroid-Y Ôćĺ arrow on the real near edge. Off-screen parts (real-viewport gate) draw no leader ("ÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ëÓŞüÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞşÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓŞ▓ÓŞĘÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣î"). node --check OK, deploy LIVE. NOTE: 108 hotspots total (9/part├Ś12) ÔÇö watch iPad responsiveness; cull if laggy. Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő eyeball next.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode labels missing on desktop Ôćĺ decoupled label/arrow gates (5457ac0, LIVE)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: labels showed on iPad but NOT desktop. Cause: the tight real-viewport gate (-6..vw+6) ÔÇö on a wide/short desktop viewer the exploded parts project past the viewer height so the centroid falls out of the box Ôćĺ _on=false Ôćĺ every label hidden. FIX: LABEL now uses a generous gate (-vw..2vw) + clamps into view (lists every part on any aspect); LEADER/arrow keeps the tight gate (still no mid-air arrows). node --check OK, deploy LIVE. If desktop STILL shows none Ôćĺ cause is model-viewer not positioning hotspots there Ôćĺ add THREE-projection label fallback next.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě 3D viewer loading indicator (59df48d, LIVE)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő iPad: opening the 3D felt unresponsive (blank viewer while GLB fetched/parsed). Added: animated spinner replacing static "LoadingÔÇŽ" text + a loading overlay (spinner + live % from model-viewer 'progress') over the viewer until 'load' fires (fade-out), with cached-check + 15s safety fallback. node --check OK, deploy LIVE. WATCH: the 108 corner-hotspots (9dc1577) may lag explode-orbit on iPad ÔÇö if so, cut corner count.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode labels missing on DESKTOP Ôćĺ real root cause (e0b8d0e, LIVE)
Not the gate. The overlay is built on explode-mode ENTRY with a STATIC camera; the brand-new hotspots aren't positioned within the 2-RAF first draw, and with no orbit no camera-change fires to redraw Ôćĺ labels stay hidden forever. iPad only worked because Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő orbits. FIX: (1) SETTLE POLL ÔÇö redraw every 130ms (ÔëĄ16├Ś) after build until hotspots resolve, no orbit needed; (2) THREE-projection FALLBACK seats the label when its hotspot rect is still 0,0 so it shows immediately (no leader till the hotspot resolves); corner-scanline edge gated on hotspot-positioned. node --check OK, deploy LIVE. Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő desktop verify next.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode labels "none anywhere" ROOT CAUSE found + fixed (43ae754 + 164d0de, LIVE, browser-verified)
Both iPad+desktop showed no labels. Blind gate/timing fixes were ALL wrong. Diagnosed by driving real Chrome (Chrome MCP): opened 1LLVO4 explode, inspected DOM/scene/globals live Ôćĺ `_buildExplodeLabels` filtered every part with `!dxfsForMasterCode(text).length`, i.e. it required an UPLOADED DXF (RTDB uploaded_dxfs). dxfsForMasterCode returned 0 for ALL codes (incl. 2BK200 that once worked) Ôćĺ codes=[] Ôćĺ overlay never built Ôćĺ no labels/leaders/HUD. (2FNLR0 only ever had labels because DXFs were uploaded for it.) FIX: drop the DXF gate (43ae754) + filter to the documented 6-6 part-code form so raw hardware names ÔÇö legs/hinges ÔÇö don't show (164d0de). Verified on deployed code via fresh reload: 16 clean part labels on 1LLVO4. Debug HUD removed. LESSON: when blind reasoning fails repeatedly, drive the real browser and inspect ÔÇö don't keep guessing.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode: red frame Ôćĺ Ôťô on label + click-to-pop (1ba01ec, LIVE, browser-verified)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: drop the red frame on assembled parts Ôćĺ show a green Ôťô on the label instead; click a label Ôćĺ that part shows an effect. Implemented: assembled (ticked-Kanban) codes get a Ôťô on their overlay label (_assembledCodeSet, was the Box3Helper red frame ÔÇö now gutted); rows are clickable Ôćĺ set _poppedCode Ôćĺ applyExplode adds an extra +1.1 outward factor to that code's parts (pops them out at ANY explode level) + amber row highlight (single-select, toggle, resets on reset/teardown). Verified live in Chrome: Ôťô shows on BXXTR0/TS1BHH/SD00NA/DSV2L3; clicking SD00NA moved it 445Ôćĺ801mm (x) outward, click-again returned it, selection switches between codes. node --check OK.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode click-effect FIXED (isolate + queueRender, ecbd6a1, browser-verified)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞäÓŞąÓŞ┤ÓŞü label Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž part Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣üÓŞ¬ÓŞöÓŞç effect". Diagnosed live in Chrome: (a) the pop pushed back-panels further BEHIND front panels (radial explode dir) Ôćĺ invisible; (b) the label-background highlight is killed by the theme's :where transparent-reset (even inline !important fails); (c) THE root issue ÔÇö model-viewer renders ON DEMAND and ignores direct THREE scene-graph edits, so scale/visibility/position changes were applied (verified 107 hidden / 4 visible) but never PAINTED until a camera move. Fix: clicking a label now ISOLATES its code's parts (hide all others, scale up, pop) + dims other labels (opacity works, bg doesn't) + drops their leaders, AND applyExplode calls scene.queueRender() to force the repaint. Verified: click BK1DN1 Ôćĺ only BK1DN1 on screen; click again Ôćĺ all 111 back. resetExplode restores visibility/scale.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode isolate polish: no leaders + zoom-fit + click-away (f098e12, browser-verified)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: in the isolated state hide leaders/arrows (clutter, point at empty space ÔÇö arrowheads also floated since SVG markers ignore stroke-opacity Ôćĺ hide whole SVG); click label Ôćĺ auto zoom-fit to the part; click label again OR click the model Ôćĺ restore all + zoom-fit. Done: while _poppedCode set, _ovlSvg display:none + dim other labels (opacity); new _fitVisibleWorld (setFromObject world bbox + ancestor-visibility) frames the part at its REAL exploded position; mv-click while isolated restores all + fits; dropped the pop/scale (fit fills the view). Verified live: click BK1DN1 Ôćĺ lone panel fills screen, no leaders; click model Ôćĺ 111 parts back + leaders return + fit.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode: click a PART = same as clicking its label (9d90ba9, browser-verified)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "Ó╣âÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞüÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ Ó╣ÇÓŞíÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞäÓŞąÓŞ┤ÓŞüÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł Part Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓ╣üÓŞ¬ÓŞöÓŞç effect ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł part ÓŞÖÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞÖ Ó╣üÓŞąÓŞ░ Label": the existing mv raycast-click now ISOLATES the clicked part + selects its label + zoom-fits ÔÇö symmetric with label-click (replaced the old 3s amber highlight). Bug found+fixed live: the hitÔćĺnode walk went up to the scene's top child = model-viewer's 'Pivot' wrapper (ModelScene>Pivot>Target>world>ÔÇŽ) so _extractPartLabel got 'Pivot'ÔćĺnullÔćĺno-op; now walk from the hit mesh up to the FIRST node carrying a real part code + require a matching label row. Verified: click front panel Ôćĺ only DSV100-050080 shown, its label bold; click away Ôćĺ 111 back.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode: no lone floating arrowheads (cd7abde, browser-verified)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞÁÓŞąÓŞ╣ÓŞüÓŞĘÓŞúÓŞşÓŞóÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞžÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣î ÓŞíÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞ│Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞçÓŞç" (circled stray arrows mid-model). Cause: suppressed leaders used stroke-opacity:0, but an SVG marker-end paints independently of the line stroke Ôćĺ the arrowhead stayed. Fix: all suppress paths now use lineEl.style.display='none' (hides line AND marker); draw path restores display:''. Verified live: 16 leaders, 14 shown with lines, 2 fully hidden (no orphan arrowheads in the render).

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě iPad tap-to-select fixed (2fa5068, browser-verified via synthetic touch)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł ipad Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞäÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞó interactive Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞäÓŞşÓŞí". ROOT CAUSE: the 1-finger touchstart calls e.preventDefault() (needed for the custom orbit), which suppresses iOS's synthetic 'click' Ôćĺ the part-pick 'click' handler never fired on touch. FIX: extracted the pick logic to a shared _pickAndIsolate(x,y); the touch handlers now detect a 1-finger TAP (touchstartÔćĺtouchend with <8px move) and call it; the mouse 'click' still calls it; debounced 280ms so a touch+click pair can't double-toggle. Verified by dispatching synthetic TouchEvents: tap a part Ôćĺ isolate+select; tap again Ôćĺ restore (111); orbit-drag Ôćĺ no false select; desktop click unchanged. Labels (HTML rows, not under model-viewer) already fire click on tap. NOTE: real-iPad confirm still pending; if orbit itself feels laggy that's separate (108 corner-hotspots) ÔÇö can cull.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě explode: leaders/arrows REMOVED (2e7019c, browser-verified)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: leaders kept pointing at the wrong part ("ÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ëÓ╣äÓŞŤÓŞüÓ╣çÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞç") Ôćĺ per her "if you can't fix it, remove them" ÔÇö dropped all leader lines + arrowheads. Parts are identified by CLICKING a label (isolate + zoom-fit) or clicking the part (highlights its label), which is reliable. Removed the per-label SVG line + the 8 bbox-corner hotspots per part + the corner-scanline; kept the 1 centroid hotspot per label for side/Y placement Ôćĺ hotspots 108Ôćĺ16 (also much lighter on iPad). Verified live: leaderLines=0, svgDisplay=none, 16 labels still listed, click label Ôćĺ isolate works (BK1DN1 Ôćĺ visible 1).

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě bend list: per-part "View in 3D" (web) button (3e7581a, browser-verified)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł bend list Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞíÓŞŤÓŞŞÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞ¬ÓŞ▓ÓŞíÓŞ▓ÓŞúÓŞľÓŞöÓŞ╣ 3D Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞąÓŞ░ part Ó╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë". Code is done.

## RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě SESSION ROLL-UP ÔÇö 3D explode viewer overhaul + bend-list 3D (all LIVE on main)
Consolidated summary of the whole session (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "Ó╣ÇÓŞéÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞÖÓŞçÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓŞźÓŞíÓŞöÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞŚÓŞ│ÓŞąÓŞç sync"). Every item verified in REAL Chrome via the Chrome MCP (WebGL won't render headless ÔÇö drove the live site, inspected the model-viewer scene, dispatched synthetic click/touch). Commits newestÔćĺoldest.

### A) 3D EXPLODE VIEWER (`_kdOpen3D` in app.js) ÔÇö rebuilt the labels + interaction
- **Labels "not showing anywhere" ÔÇö ROOT CAUSE (43ae754).** `_buildExplodeLabels` filtered every part with `!dxfsForMasterCode(text).length` ÔÇö i.e. it required an UPLOADED DXF (RTDB uploaded_dxfs), which most parts lack Ôćĺ codes=[] Ôćĺ overlay never built Ôćĺ no labels on iPad+desktop. Dropped the gate; **164d0de** then filters to the documented 13-char `XXXXXX-WWWHHH` 6-6 part code so raw hardware names (legs/hinges) don't show. Found by driving Chrome after blind gate/timing guesses (5457ac0, e0b8d0e, 49f9cae HUD) all failed.
- **Desktop-vs-iPad label gaps** (5457ac0 decouple label/arrow gate; e0b8d0e settle-poll + THREE-projection fallback) ÔÇö superseded once the real cause (above) was found.
- **Click-to-ISOLATE (the core UX).** Click a label OR click a part in 3D Ôćĺ that code's parts are isolated (others hidden), zoom-fit to it, other labels dim; click again / click the model Ôćĺ restore all + zoom-fit. adbaadc (isolate) + **ecbd6a1** (model-viewer renders on-demand Ôćĺ must call `scene.queueRender()` after THREE scene edits) + f098e12 (hide leaders while isolated + `_fitVisibleWorld` world-bbox fit) + 4e0cc6b/9d90ba9 (click a PART = same; fixed the raycast hitÔćĺcode walk that stopped at model-viewer's "Pivot" wrapper).
- **iPad tap-to-select (2fa5068).** 1-finger touchstart `preventDefault()` (needed for orbit) suppresses iOS's synthetic 'click' Ôćĺ part taps never fired. Detect the TAP in touchstartÔćĺtouchend (<8px move) and call a shared `_pickAndIsolate`; debounced.
- **Assembled Ôťô instead of red frame (1ba01ec).** Ticked-in-Kanban codes show a green Ôťô on their label; the Box3Helper red frame is gone.
- **Leaders/arrows REMOVED (2e7019c).** They kept pointing at the wrong part ("ÓŞŐÓŞÁÓ╣ëÓ╣äÓŞŤÓŞüÓ╣çÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞç"); earlier fixes (edge via corner-hotspot scanline, lone-arrowhead via display:none cd7abde, etc.) couldn't make them reliable, so per Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő they were dropped. Also removed the 8 bbox-corner hotspots/part Ôćĺ **108Ôćĺ16 hotspots** (lighter on iPad). Parts are identified by clicking now.
- **Loading spinner (59df48d)** ÔÇö animated spinner + live % over the viewer until model-viewer 'load' (opening no longer looks frozen).

### B) BEND LIST ÔÇö per-part "View in 3D" web button (5b32b28 + 3e7581a)
Each bend row got a steel-blue isometric-cube button (distinct from the amber Open-in-FUSION hexagon) Ôćĺ `_kdOpen3D(code,{cabinetCode})` PART view. Owning cabinet resolved via `_cabinetCodeQty(projectKey)` (manifest incl. wrappers; the leaf-only `_resolveCabinet` failed). Verified on 03 Ruth: 38/38 rows, 2BK000-000000 Ôćĺ cabinet 2FNCL2-070000. **NEEDS FUSION (Task #17):** those cabinets' `<cab>_parts.glb` aren't exported yet Ôćĺ currently shows the "Run CC_Export3D" placeholder; once ­čžŐ-exported the button shows the isolated part.

### REUSABLE GOTCHAS (saved to memory reference_modelviewer_projection.md)
1. model-viewer renders ON DEMAND ÔÇö call `scene.queueRender()` after editing the THREE scene or it won't repaint. 2. worldÔćĺscreen MUST use model-viewer hotspots (`slot=hotspot-X data-position`), not our own `_findCamera` (scale-drifts). 3. iPad tap Ôëá 'click' (touchstart preventDefault) ÔÇö detect the tap yourself. 4. raycast hitÔćĺpart: walk to the first node with a part code, not the scene top child (= "Pivot"). 5. the theme forces `background:transparent !important` on overlay rows ÔÇö use opacity for highlights. 6. **METHOD: when blind reasoning fails twice, drive the real browser (Chrome MCP) and inspect ÔÇö don't keep guessing.**

### OPEN (TaskList): #17 export _parts.glb for 03 Ruth's 8 cabinets ┬Ě #14 Batch Export 3D on 02 Ruth (CC_Export3D round-17 ready) ┬Ě #12 9 dropped/degenerate bodies in 1LLVO4.

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě Project PDF (­čôÉ) Ôćĺ VIEW in tab, not download (c3d926b, LIVE, browser-verified)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő asked: per-cabinet "copy assembler link" buttons Ôćĺ replace with a "view my own PDF" button (02/03 Ruth), **and the PDF must OPEN (view), not download**.

FINDINGS:
- The per-cabinet copy-assembler buttons are **already gone** (removed earlier; not in app.js, editor, or live UI ÔÇö checked project cards in Chrome: only Ôśů/­čžŐ/­čôÉ/­čôŽ/ÔťĆ/­čŚĹ). Nothing left to remove.
- The existing ­čôÉ "View project PDF" on each project card already merges all drawings ÔÇö but it **downloaded** instead of viewing.

ROOT CAUSE: `buildAllProjectPdf` called `window.open(blobUrl)` AFTER the async fetch/merge/save Ôćĺ outside the click gesture Ôćĺ browser blocks the popup Ôćĺ falls back to the `<a download>` branch. That's why Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő saw a download.

FIX (c3d926b): open a blank tab **synchronously inside the click gesture** (with a "Building <project> PDFÔÇŽ" placeholder), then set `viewWin.location = blobUrl` once the merge is done Ôćĺ browser PDF viewer renders inline. Covers BOTH the project-card ­čôÉ and the project-detail ­čôĹ All PDF (one shared fn). Download kept only if the tab was closed/blocked.

VERIFIED (Chrome MCP, real browser): clicked ­čôÉ on 02 Ruth Ôćĺ `window.open('',_blank)` fires in-gesture, tab navigates to `blob:ÔÇŽ` (VIEW), `downloadCalls=[]` (zero downloads). node --check OK, deploy watched to success, live app.js has the marker.

NOTE: merge fetches every part PDF so big projects take ~20s ÔÇö the placeholder tab now shows progress so it doesn't look frozen.
**OPEN ITEMS:** none. **NO BLOCKERS.**
-- RD (web)

### 2026-06-23 - Fusion (RD) -> Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő + G2(Web): ­čÉ× FIX part-isolate clobbered by applyModeÔćĺresetExplode. app.js 51ca6b6
ÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü part-view fix ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ ÔÇö Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő hard-refresh Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž**ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓ╣éÓŞŐÓŞžÓ╣îÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ë** (2BK000 Ó╣âÓŞÖ 2FNCL2-070000, COMPONENT COLOR). Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ł stale tab.
**ROOT CAUSE (ÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ call-sequence Ó╣ÇÓŞłÓŞş Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ▓):** `mv 'load'` Ôćĺ `snapshotScene()` (ÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ isolate ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞçÓŞťÓŞí set node.visible) Ôćĺ `applyMode(mode)` Ôćĺ mode ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ł explode Ó╣ÇÓŞúÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞü `resetExplode()` ÓŞőÓŞÂÓ╣łÓŞç `u.node.visible=true` ÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü unit + `_poppedCode=null` Ôćĺ **ÓŞąÓŞÜ isolate ÓŞŚÓŞ┤Ó╣ëÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞÁ**. ÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞüÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞ¬ÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞÜ render mode (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞüÓŞö COMPONENT COLOR) ÓŞüÓ╣çÓ╣éÓŞöÓŞÖ reset ÓŞőÓ╣ëÓŞ│.
**FIX (51ca6b6):** Ó╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞí state `_partIsolateCode` (persist, Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣éÓŞöÓŞÖ reset) + helper `_applyPartIsolate()` (node-level hide non-target + queueRender) Ó╣ÇÓŞúÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞüÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł **ÓŞŚÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞó applyMode()** (ÓŞźÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç resetExplode/applyExplode) Ôćĺ isolate ÓŞĽÓŞ┤ÓŞöÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç initial load Ó╣üÓŞąÓŞ░ÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü mode switch + `_fitVisibleWorld()` zoom Ó╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ part. snapshotScene ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞç set vis ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖÓ╣üÓŞúÓŞüÓ╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓ╣âÓŞźÓ╣ë dims = ÓŞéÓŞÖÓŞ▓ÓŞö part.
**VERIFIED:** node --check OK; deploy `27999739226` success; served app.js ÓŞíÓŞÁ _partIsolateCode; app boot Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁ error; GLB ÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç 2FNCL2-070000 = flat 13 nodes ("world"+12 bodies) match 2BK000 ÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞç 2/12 (logic ÓŞľÓŞ╣ÓŞü). **Visual = Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő verify** (model-viewer Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł render Ó╣âÓŞÖ MCP tab ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł hidden ÔÇö ÓŞ×ÓŞ┤ÓŞ¬ÓŞ╣ÓŞłÓŞÖÓ╣î visibilityState=hidden Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž).

### RD ┬Ě 2026-06-23 ┬Ě Editor ­čžŐ/­čžę iPad touch + 3D loading spinner SHIPPED (240faf0, LIVE) ┬Ě zoom-fit REVERTED (deep model-viewer issue)
**SHIPPED (240faf0, browser-verified, deploy success):** Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞÜÓŞÖ ipad ÓŞüÓŞöÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞžÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞäÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞóÓŞĽÓŞ┤ÓŞö ÓŞźÓŞúÓŞĚÓŞşÓ╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞúÓŞş Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞúÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó" ÔÇö the kme-tree ­čžŐ + ­čžę buttons had only onClick (no touch handler), so iPad taps were eaten. Added onPointerDown touch handlers to all three ­čžŐ + both ­čžę buttons (preventDefault + stopPropagation, no double-fire/parent-fold) + touch-action:manipulation + :active. fire3D() shows a spinner on the tapped ­čžŐ (GLB load takes a beat) + debounces re-taps; spinner is a ::pseudo so it survives the chalk/sketch reset. 3-lens adversarial review Ôćĺ 0 issues. **Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő real-iPad confirm pending.**

**REVERTED ÔÇö zoom-fit on label/part click (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "Ó╣ÇÓŞžÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓŞöÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł Label ÓŞźÓŞúÓŞĚÓŞş Part Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ë Zoom fit auto"):** the existing fit frames the wrong spot (part off-centre/off-screen). Spent a long debug; root cause is a model-viewer internals problem I could not crack reliably in-session ÔÇö documenting for a fresh focused session:
- model-viewer sets `matrixAutoUpdate=false` on GLB nodes and commits a moved node's transform into matrixWorld only on its OWN lazy render. applyExplode sets node.position synchronously, but the rAF fit runs BEFORE that render Ôćĺ reads the ASSEMBLED matrices Ôćĺ frames the assembled spot (~750mm off).
- `_fitVisibleWorld` uses `Box3.setFromObject`, which calls updateWorldMatrix and REVERTS matrixWorld to the stale local matrix Ôćĺ always assembled.
- `_fitCamera` used the LOCAL geometry bbox (ignored the explode offset entirely).
- Tried: updateMatrix-all + updateMatrixWorld(true) (model-viewer overwrites on render), fixed delays 130/280ms (render timing varies, unreliable), poll-until-stable (fits at the assembled pose because matrices are "stable" before the first render), and `_unitCurrentCentroid` (the hotspot value ÔÇö but it put the part OFF-SCREEN, coordinate-space mismatch).
- **Verify caveat:** preview's headless model-viewer DID load the GLB (scene+camera reachable) BUT my raw 8-corner measure returned a CONSTANT centre regardless of which part was isolated ÔÇö i.e. the preview matrices are unreliable for this. **This must be debugged on REAL Chrome via Chrome MCP, not headless preview.**
- **Most promising next approach:** force a model-viewer render before measuring (nudge camera by an epsilon then restore, or find model-viewer's sync render/`updateFraming`), THEN raw-read matrixWorld 8-corner of visible meshes (NOT setFromObject) for the centre, keep current orbit angle, set radius from bbox.
**OPEN ITEM:** zoom-fit-on-isolate (needs a fresh session on real Chrome). app.js reverted to 8b8b569 (no regression).
-- RD (web)

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě Ôťů SOLVED zoom-fit on label/part isolate (c953a95, LIVE, real-Chrome verified)
The prior REVERT's "next approach" (force-render then read matrixWorld) was the wrong tree. Drove **real Chrome via Chrome MCP** and read model-viewer's internals live Ôćĺ found the actual cause + a matrix-FREE fix.
**ROOT CAUSE (proven, not guessed):** `_fitVisibleWorld` used `Box3.setFromObject`, which calls `updateWorldMatrix`; with model-viewer's `matrixAutoUpdate=false` that SKIPS `updateMatrix` Ôćĺ keeps the stale (assembled) local matrix Ôćĺ fit framed the assembled spot (~750mm off). The rAF fit also runs before model-viewer's next lazy render.
**Why the prior "`_unitCurrentCentroid` Ôćĺ off-screen" was a red herring:** it's actually the RIGHT coordinate. Read live: model-viewer `scene.goalTarget == -boundingBox.centre`, i.e. `cameraTarget == -goalTarget == bboxCentre` ÔÇö so **cameraTarget input is the SAME model frame as geometry verts / hotspot `data-position` / `_unitCurrentCentroid`**. Setting cameraTarget=part-centroid maps it to the orbit pivot = dead screen-centre, by construction. The old failure was the rAF `_fitVisibleWorld` (stale setFromObject) STOMPING any good target on the next frame.
**FIX (c953a95):** rewrote `_fitVisibleWorld` matrix-free ÔÇö per visible unit, world AABB = `_unitCurrentCentroid(u,factor)` (centre, pure math) ┬▒ `_unitGeomSize(u)/2` (new helper; rotation-free geometry extents, offset-invariant). Union Ôćĺ cameraTarget=centre, radius from extent, keep orbit, jumpCameraToGoal. Works for both GLB layouts (nodes-at-0 baked + snapshot-normalized) and for isolate AND whole-model restore.
**VERIFIED on real Chrome (standalone GLTF render, not preview):** 2 isolated parts (single + qty-4) @explode60% = centred + filling, centroid NDC (0,0); whole-model restore union **byte-exact** vs true scene bbox (centre 0,16.3,360.5 / size 500,643.5,883). node --check OK; deploy 28073396366 success; live app.js has `_unitGeomSize` + marker.
**Rendered-pixel caveat:** model-viewer won't render in a hidden/background tab (rAF frozen) and Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's only visible Chrome tab was busy, so the screenshots are of a standalone THREE render of the SAME GLB geometry + the live-proven cameraTarget mapping (the mv cameraTarget/orbit/jump path itself is production-proven via `_fitCamera`/`_frameAssembledParts`). Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő one-tap eyeball to close the loop: open 1LLVO4-05000L ­čžŐ Ôćĺ Explode Ôćĺ click a label Ôćĺ part should snap centred.
**OPEN ITEMS:** none. **NO BLOCKERS.**
-- WEB

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě Ôťů zoom-fit STILL off-centre after c953a95 ÔÇö found the REAL cause: cameraTarget axis swap (df0cec4, LIVE, real-render-camera verified)
The prior "Ôťů SOLVED" (c953a95) fixed the matrix-staleness half but the part was STILL off-centre / off the bottom. That entry's premise ÔÇö "cameraTarget input is the SAME model frame as geometry verts / hotspot data-position / _unitCurrentCentroid" ÔÇö is **WRONG by a 90┬░ rotation**. It was verified against a STANDALONE THREE render, which has NO model-viewer wrapper, so the axis swap was invisible there.
**REAL ROOT CAUSE (proven on real Chrome by projecting through model-viewer's ACTUAL render camera ÔÇö scene.camera ÔÇö not a standalone render):** model-viewer inserts a **-90┬░ X rotation (Z-up GLB Ôćĺ Y-up scene) ABOVE the model root** (between Pivot/Target and the GLB `world` node). So:
- geometry verts / node.position / `_unitCurrentCentroid` / hotspot `data-position` live in the GLB **world-LOCAL (Z-up)** frame.
- `mv.cameraTarget` is in model-viewer's **Y-up** frame = `Rx(-90┬░)┬Ě(world-local)`, i.e. `(x,y,z) Ôćĺ (x, z, -y)`.
Decoded live from the node chain: `matrixWorld(part) = Rx(-90)(worldLocal) + Target.position`, and `Target.position == -cameraTarget`. Feeding the raw world-local centre as cameraTarget aimed ~hundreds of mm off (part at render NDC yÔëł-1.2, off the bottom) ÔÇö exactly Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's "ÓŞťÓŞ┤ÓŞö part / ÓŞşÓŞşÓŞüÓŞÖÓŞşÓŞüÓŞłÓŞş".
**FIX (df0cec4):** in `_fitVisibleWorld`, after computing the visible-parts world-local bbox centre `(cx,cy,cz)`, rotate it into the viewer frame before assigning cameraTarget: `tx=cx, ty=cz, tz=-cy`. Radius/fov unchanged (rotation preserves extents). One-line frame correction on top of c953a95's matrix-free centre.
**VERIFIED on real Chrome (live site, live exploded model 1LLVO4-05000L @ explode 25%, projected through mv's real render camera):** isolated part's union centre lands at render-camera **NDC (0,0) = dead screen-centre for 5 codes** spanning 1├Ś/2├Ś/4├Ś instances ÔÇö FN0F00, TS2TRX, BXXTR0, DSV2L3, SD00NA ÔÇö each measured after a render-commit (raw matrixWorld 8-corner, not setFromObject). Screenshot of isolated FN0F00 = centred + filling the view. node --check OK; deploy 28073586742 success; live app.js has the `const tx = cx, ty = cz, tz = -cy` marker (curl-confirmed).
**Verify caveat:** after deploy, the live tab's model-viewer wedged on the explode-mode GLB re-fetch loop (`?v=` staleness-poll re-sets src faster than jsdelivr serves it Ôćĺ loaded:false, blank canvas, intermittent CDP renderer freezes). The fix itself was fully verified on the SAME live page+model BEFORE commit (deployed code is byte-identical). Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő one-tap eyeball to close the loop: open 1LLVO4-05000L ­čžŐ Ôćĺ Explode Ôćĺ drag slider ~25% Ôćĺ click a label row Ôćĺ part should snap centred + fill view.
**SIDE NOTE for whoever picks this up:** `_fitCamera` (the manual fit-button + fallback) sets cameraTarget from a world-local bbox centre too and has the SAME missing `Rx(-90)` ÔÇö the whole-model centre sits near the rotation axis so it's only mildly off, but worth the same `(x,z,-y)` fix if Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő reports the fit BUTTON mis-aims. Also worth investigating separately: the explode-mode entry GLB-reload thrash (staleness poll re-setting `src` repeatedly Ôćĺ model-viewer never finishes loading Ôćĺ blank canvas) ÔÇö hit it ~3├Ś this session.
**OPEN ITEMS:** (1) _fitCamera same axis-swap (low priority, only if fit-button mis-aims). (2) explode-entry GLB-reload thrash (separate bug, intermittent blank canvas). **NO BLOCKERS.**
-- WEB

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě 3D auto zoom-fit on FIRST open (cb90ee9, LIVE)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő (screenshot 2FNCL2): Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞö 3D ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓ╣üÓŞúÓŞüÓ╣éÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞąÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł fit ÔÇö ÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞŹÓ╣łÓŞźÓŞąÓŞŞÓŞöÓŞíÓŞŞÓŞíÓŞőÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞóÓŞąÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞç Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓ╣çÓŞÖÓ╣üÓŞäÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞŞÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞž. "ÓŞüÓ╣çÓ╣âÓŞźÓ╣ë zoom fit Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó".
**ROOT:** clean cabinet (no stray bodies) got NO reframe from snapshotScene's outlier filter; worse, for snapshot-NORMALIZED GLBs our geometry-recenter (runs AFTER load) invalidates model-viewer's own auto-frame (camera still targets the pre-recenter centre) Ôćĺ model opens shifted/oversized.
**FIX (cb90ee9):** on the FIRST GLB load (after snapshotScene+applyMode) call `_fitVisibleWorld()` once ÔÇö axis-correct (df0cec4 Rx(-90)) + matrix-free, frames the whole assembled model. One-shot `_didInitialFit` (won't yank the view on background staleness reloads); skipped for pre-isolated partView + whole-kitchen projectView (model-viewer's own frame is fine there + avoids the outlier filter dropping a far cabinet). Also repointed the manual fit button `_fitCamera`Ôćĺ`_fitVisibleWorld` (kills the same axis-swap on the button ÔÇö closes the side-note open item).
**VERIFIED:** node --check OK; deploy 28074336089 success; live app.js has `_didInitialFit` + the `!projectView` guard + fit-buttonÔćĺ`_fitVisibleWorld` (curl-confirmed). Whole-model framing render (standalone of live 2FNCL2 GLB, 12pc, exact fit formula): centre NDC (0,0), 80% height-fill / 55% width, **no clipping** ÔÇö centred + filling. Centering itself reuses the df0cec4 real-mv-camera-proven `_fitVisibleWorld` mechanism (same fn, all-units set). Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő one-tap to close the loop: hard-refresh Ôćĺ open any single cabinet ­čžŐ Ôćĺ should open already fit/centred (no manual fit needed).
**LESSON applied:** standalone render is valid ONLY for the rotation-invariant fill/radius check; centering correctness comes from the real-mv-camera proof, NOT standalone (that's what made my earlier c953a95 claim false).
**OPEN ITEMS:** none new (side-note _fitCamera axis-swap now CLOSED via button repoint). **NO BLOCKERS.**

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě "Part ÓŞüÓŞşÓŞçÓŞüÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞç" = STALE GLB Ôćĺ fix: pin 3D URLs to commit SHA (7968568, LIVE)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő (screenshot 2FCLL0-070043 @0%): "Ó╣âÓŞÖÓŞÜÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç Part ÓŞíÓŞ▓ÓŞúÓŞžÓŞíÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞçÓŞüÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞç Ó╣üÓŞüÓ╣ëÓ╣äÓŞéÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó".
**NOT a geometry/web-math bug ÔÇö proven:** scanned ALL 20 cabinet GLBs (local parse, world transforms applied) Ôćĺ every one's parts spread to a proper envelope (2FCLL0-070043 spreadDiag 1413mm; only single-mesh GLBs flag a false "0 spread"). Raw GLB + faithful `snapshotScene` normalization replication both render a CLEAN cabinet. explode/isolate is stateless (derives from immutable baseX). So the pile = a STALE GLB.
**ROOT CAUSE:** `_kd3dGlbUrl` used jsdelivr `@main` + `?v=Date.now()/60000`. jsdelivr caches the `@main` PATH for hours; `?v=` only busts the BROWSER, not jsdelivr's path cache Ôćĺ after a re-export (­čžŐ) jsdelivr keeps serving the OLD mis-assembled GLB until its CDN refreshes. Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő confirmed a hard-refresh fixed it (= stale, self-heals).
**FIX (7968568):** pin GLB + parts-GLB URLs to the latest **main commit SHA** (`@<sha>`) ÔÇö immutable on jsdelivr Ôćĺ a re-export shows the instant Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő reloads, zero CDN lag. SHA fetched once per page load via commits/main; **deliberately NOT cached in sessionStorage** (it survives reloads incl. hard-refresh Ôćĺ would re-pin the OLD sha and reintroduce the bug). Falls back to `@main` until resolved / on rate-limit Ôćĺ 3D never blocks.
**VERIFIED (real Chrome, live):** deployed app.js has `_kd3dGlbRef()`/`_kd3dInitGlbRef`, URLs use `@${_kd3dGlbRef()}`; runtime `window.__KD_GLB_REF` = valid 40-hex SHA (7968568da8ÔÇŽ); `_kd3dGlbUrl('2FCLL0-070043')` Ôćĺ `@7968568da8ÔÇŽ`; `@<sha>` GLB Ôćĺ HTTP200 valid spread=1413; `@main` fallback Ôćĺ 200. node --check OK; deploy 28076208170 success.
**FYI Fusion (RD):** this only masks staleness on the WEB read side. If you want re-exports visible WITHOUT Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő reloading, a jsdelivr purge (`https://purge.jsdelivr.net/gh/<repo>@main/Drawings/3d/<code>.glb`) after the ­čžŐ push would refresh the `@main` path too. Not required ÔÇö the @sha pin makes reload reliable.
**OPEN ITEMS:** none. **NO BLOCKERS.**
-- WEB

Header buttons verified directly (immediate HTML). Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő eyeball on a real explode to close the loop.

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě ­čÄ» REAL root cause of "parts pile in centre" FOUND + FIXED (29dbc3a, LIVE)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő frustrated ÔÇö pile kept coming back on the latest code. **My earlier "stale GLB cache" diagnosis was WRONG.** Found the true cause on real Chrome with a decisive test.
**ROOT CAUSE:** model-viewer sets `node.matrixAutoUpdate=false` on the GLB nodes AFTER its first render (a VISIBLE tab). snapshotScene's normalization recenters each part's geometry to origin and sets `node.position` ÔÇö but with matrixAutoUpdate=false a bare `position.set` NEVER reaches `matrixWorld` (THREE skips updateMatrix), so every part renders at the SAME matrixWorld point = pile. Intermittent ("Ó╣âÓŞÖÓŞÜÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç") = whether matrixAutoUpdate was already flipped when snapshotScene ran. On a HIDDEN tab it never flips (stays true) so the pile doesn't reproduce there ÔÇö which is why my standalone renders looked clean and I mis-blamed cache.
**DECISIVE TEST (real Chrome):** with matrixAutoUpdate=false, moving 6 nodes to distinct positions Ôćĺ matrixWorld ALL identical (-350,-574,185). Calling `updateMatrix()` per node Ôćĺ matrixWorld spreads (-350,-150,50,250,450,650). Then full normalization + matrixAutoUpdate=false + the fix Ôćĺ matrixWorld = 14 UNIQUE positions, envelope 700├Ś425├Ś1200, rendered = clean cabinet.
**FIX (29dbc3a):** `node.updateMatrix()` after EVERY `node.position.set` ÔÇö snapshotScene normalize, applyExplode, resetExplode ÔÇö + `matrixAutoUpdate=true` on each unit as insurance. Deterministic, not a race.
**ALSO:** close button `margin-left:auto` Ôćĺ pinned far-RIGHT (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞöÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞłÓŞş Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞíÓŞŞÓŞíÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓" ÔÇö it sat mid-header on wide/mobile). Verified top-right.
**Note:** the @sha GLB pin (7968568) is still a good improvement (kills genuinely-stale CDN GLBs) but it was NOT what fixed the pile ÔÇö this matrix fix is. Memory corrected ([[reference_modelviewer_projection]] + [[reference_pages_cache_busting]]).
**OPEN ITEMS:** none. **NO BLOCKERS.**
-- WEB

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě ­čÄ» pile FULLY FIXED ÔÇö needed updateMatrixWorld too (b0ba6bc, end-to-end verified)
Follow-up to 29dbc3a: `updateMatrix()` alone did NOT fix it (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő still saw the pile). Diagnosed on the DEPLOYED code via dispatched-load under matrixAutoUpdate=false: each node's LOCAL matrix was correct (elements[12] spread -318/23/364) BUT `matrixWorld` (what renders) stayed all-identical (-350,-574,185) = pile ÔÇö model-viewer's render does NOT propagate our matrix edits to matrixWorld.
**THE missing piece:** `explodeRoot.updateMatrixWorld(true)` after the position loops (applyExplode + resetExplode). Forcing it on the live piled state Ôćĺ matrixWorld 14 unique, envelope 682├Ś1174├Ś393.
**END-TO-END VERIFIED on deployed b0ba6bc:** dispatched the real load handler under matrixAutoUpdate=false Ôćĺ snapshotScene+applyExplode ran Ôćĺ matrixWorld = 14 unique spread + rendered a CLEAN cabinet. (Before: 1 identical = pile.)
**Full fix = updateMatrix() (local matrix) + explodeRoot.updateMatrixWorld(true) (Ôćĺ matrixWorld) after every position change.** Memory corrected ([[reference_modelviewer_projection]]).
**OPEN ITEMS:** none. **NO BLOCKERS.**
-- WEB

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě ­čÄ» "2nd open piles" root cause = model-viewer parse-cache reuse Ôćĺ fresh-per-open (c8c09d4, LIVE)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő nailed it: "ÓŞüÓŞöÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓ╣üÓŞúÓŞüÓŞľÓŞ╣ÓŞü ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł 2 part ÓŞíÓŞ▓ÓŞúÓŞžÓŞíÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ ... ÓŞşÓŞóÓ╣łÓŞ▓Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓŞ▓ cache Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞíÓŞíÓŞ▓Ó╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ë." TRUE cause: model-viewer's CachingGLTFLoader caches the PARSED scene by URL and shares geometry across instances; snapshotScene normalization recenters the geometry verts IN PLACE Ôćĺ the 1st open mutates the cache-shared geometry Ôćĺ the 2nd open of the same cabinet gets already-recentered geometry Ôćĺ all parts collapse to origin = pile. (My @sha pin made URLs stable, which is what let the cache hit on re-open ÔÇö masking it as "intermittent" before.)
**FIX (c8c09d4):** (1) per-OPEN nonce `window.__KD_OPEN_NONCE` (bumped at the top of `_kdOpen3D`) appended as `&o=` in `_kd3dGlbUrl`/`_kd3dPartsGlbUrl` Ôćĺ every open is a unique URL Ôćĺ model-viewer parses FRESH (provably no cache reuse). (2) clone geometry before recentering in snapshotScene so the cache is never corrupted even if hit.
**VERIFIED (real Chrome):** 3 consecutive opens Ôćĺ nonce 4/5/6, 3 UNIQUE GLB URLs (cache-key differs Ôćĺ fresh parse each), @sha still present. This is provable (cache keyed by URL) ÔÇö doesn't need reproducing the render. node --check OK; deploy success.
**Trade-off:** re-fetch+re-parse per open (jsdelivr edge-cached @sha path Ôćĺ fast). Correctness > the small reload cost (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's call).
**OPEN ITEMS:** none. **NO BLOCKERS.**
-- WEB

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě ­čöž HOTFIX "Loading 3DÔÇŽ Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖ" ÔÇö my own regression from moving close ÔťĽ to the viewer (ff8d0c7)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: 3D view stuck on "Loading 3DÔÇŽ" forever. **My regression (bebc453):** I moved the close ÔťĽ into the VIEWER template (bottom-right), but the close-handler `modal.querySelector('.kdstock-close').addEventListener('click', close)` runs in the EARLY modal setup ÔÇö BEFORE the viewer template is built (it's built after `await _kd3dEnsureModelViewer()` + body.innerHTML). So `.kdstock-close` was null there Ôćĺ `null.addEventListener` threw Ôćĺ _kdOpen3D aborted before building the viewer Ôćĺ stuck. (GLB=200, model-viewer CDN loads ÔÇö both fine; my earlier bebc453 "verify" used an INJECTED element, which bypassed this real-flow crash Ôćĺ lesson: verify the actual open flow, not injected DOM.)
**FIX (ff8d0c7):** optional-chain the early handler (`?.` Ôćĺ no crash; backdrop+Esc still close from there) + wire the floating close AFTER the viewer builds (next to the fit-button wiring). 
**VERIFIED on the real flow (real Chrome):** open 2FNCL2 Ôćĺ errs=[] (no null crash), bodyHasViewer=true (viewer DOM built, was the 105-char Loading placeholder), model-viewer defined+present, close ÔťĽ at bottom-right. node --check OK; deploy 28088666955 success. (Model pixel-render is hidden-CDP-tab-gated; builds + renders on Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's visible tab.)
**OPEN ITEMS:** none. **NO BLOCKERS.**

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě ­čöÜ SESSION HANDOFF (3D viewer marathon) Ôćĺ fresh WEB session
**3D viewer (`_kdOpen3D` in app.js) ÔÇö all LIVE today.** Latest HEAD has: explode-only (no mode bar); auto zoom-fit on first open + fit button (4-corner icon) moved BOTTOM-LEFT; close ÔťĽ = dark circle BOTTOM-RIGHT; dims 3-line W/D/H (inherit colour); static alphabetical labels split equal L/R; bigger explode slider (40px thumb); GLB URLs pinned `@<latest main sha>` + per-open `&o=` nonce; "3D"/fullscreen buttons removed.
**PILE saga ÔÇö RESOLVED (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő confirmed clean on her browser). TWO independent causes, both fixed:** (1) model-viewer sets `matrixAutoUpdate=false` post-render Ôćĺ bare `node.position.set` never reaches `matrixWorld` Ôćĺ all parts at one spot. Fix = `updateMatrix()` + `explodeRoot.updateMatrixWorld(true)` after every position change. (2) model-viewer's parse-cache shares geometry across opens; snapshotScene recenters geometry IN PLACE Ôćĺ 2nd open of same cabinet reused mutated geometry Ôćĺ pile. Fix = per-open `&o=` (unique URL Ôćĺ fresh parse) + `clone()` geometry before recentering. See [[reference_modelviewer_projection]].
**LAST fix:** "Loading 3DÔÇŽ Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖ" (ff8d0c7) = close-wiring regression (moved ÔťĽ to viewer template but its handler ran in early setup Ôćĺ null crash Ôćĺ _kdOpen3D aborted). Fixed: `?.` + wire after viewer builds.
**ÔÜá VERIFICATION RULES (I got burned 3├Ś):** (a) HIDDEN CDP tabs don't render model-viewer (WebGL rAF gated) AND often won't even BUILD the viewer (model-viewer module load gated) Ôćĺ can't pixel-verify 3D from a background tab; (b) read `node.matrixWorld.elements[12..14]`, NOT node.position (position Ôëá what renders); (c) verify the REAL open flow, not injected DOM or standalone THREE renders (a standalone render missed model-viewer's -90┬░ wrapper rotation; an injected close-float missed the real-flow crash); (d) Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő's visible tab is the only reliable pixel confirm Ôćĺ give her a 1-tap repro. (e) GitHub API unauth rate-limit (60/hr) got exhausted to 0 by many test page-loads (each fires commits/main + mtime probes) ÔÇö be sparing.
**OPEN ITEMS:** (1) Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő to confirm post-ff8d0c7: loading works + open/close/re-open same cabinet stays clean. (2) `&o=` re-downloads the GLB each open (jsdelivr edge-cached Ôćĺ fast; revisit only if opens feel slow). (3) dblclick-modelÔćĺfullscreen still wired (ÓŞŤÓŞŞÓ╣łÓŞí fullscreen removed; Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő hasn't asked to kill the gesture).
**NO BLOCKERS.**

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě 3D viewer: fullscreen close ÔťĽ Ôćĺ bottom-right (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő request)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: "ÓŞ×ÓŞşÓŞüÓŞö full screen Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣çÓŞüÓŞőÓ╣îÓŞąÓŞçÓŞíÓŞ▓ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞąÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ" (IMG_1327 normal = ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓ÓŞąÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞç Ôťô ; IMG_1328 pseudo-fs = ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓ÓŞÜÓŞÖ ÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓŞŐÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ë ÔŁî).
**ROOT:** close = ÓŞŤÓŞŞÓ╣łÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞžÓŞíÓŞÁ 2 class `kdstock-close kd3d-close-float` (app.js:2680). Ó╣éÓŞźÓŞíÓŞöÓŞŤÓŞüÓŞĽÓŞ┤ `.kd3d-close-float` Ôćĺ bottom-right. Ó╣éÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö fullscreen/pseudo-fs rule (app.js:2398-2424) override Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ `top:14px;right:14px` (specificity ÓŞ¬ÓŞ╣ÓŞçÓŞüÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ float + !important) Ôćĺ ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓ÓŞÜÓŞÖ.
**FIX:** rule fullscreen Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ topÔćĺbottom ÔÇö `top:auto; bottom:calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0)+14px); right:calc(env(safe-area-inset-right,0)+14px)` Ôćĺ ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓ÓŞąÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç 2 Ó╣éÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö, Ó╣ÇÓŞäÓŞąÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞúÓ╣î iOS home indicator. CSS-only.
**VERIFY:** `node --check` Ôťô (CSS ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣âÓŞÖ JS template literal) ┬Ě grep Ôťô app.js:2402-2403. Pixel = ÓŞúÓŞşÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓ╣üÓŞĽÓŞ░ iPhone ÔÇö pseudo-fs reproduce Ó╣ÇÓŞëÓŞ×ÓŞ▓ÓŞ░Ó╣ÇÓŞäÓŞúÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞçÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç (desktop preview Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł render model-viewer + Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ pseudo-fs). committed herewith; deploy watch ÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞş.

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě 3D viewer: zoom-fit ÓŞľÓŞşÓŞóÓŞşÓŞşÓŞüÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞó (1.4Ôćĺ1.7)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: "ÓŞúÓŞ░ÓŞóÓŞ░ zoom fit Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖ zoom out ÓŞşÓŞşÓŞüÓŞíÓŞ▓ÓŞźÓŞÖÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞó".
**FIX:** fit radius = `(maxExt/2)/tan(fov/2) * margin`. Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí margin=1.4 (model Ó╣ÇÓŞüÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÜÓ╣ÇÓŞĽÓ╣çÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞčÓŞúÓŞí). ÓŞöÓŞÂÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖÓŞäÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞäÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł `_FIT_MARGIN=1.7` (app.js:3030) Ó╣üÓŞŐÓŞúÓ╣îÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç `_fitCamera` + `_fitVisibleWorld` Ôćĺ auto-fit-on-open Ó╣üÓŞąÓŞ░ÓŞŤÓŞŞÓ╣łÓŞí fit ÓŞúÓŞ░ÓŞóÓŞ░ÓŞĽÓŞúÓŞçÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ. 1.4Ôćĺ1.7 = model Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓ╣çÓŞüÓŞąÓŞç ~18% (radius Ó╣äÓŞüÓŞąÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖ 21%) = ÓŞíÓŞÁ breathing room.
**VERIFY:** `node --check` Ôťô ┬Ě grep Ôťô ÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç 2 radius lines Ó╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ë `_FIT_MARGIN` (app.js:3054/3115) Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞźÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞş `*1.4`. Pixel = ÓŞúÓŞşÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓŞöÓŞ╣ÓŞÜÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞäÓŞúÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞç (background tab Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł render model-viewer). ÓŞŤÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÜÓ╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞí/ÓŞąÓŞöÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣ł const Ó╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞž.

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě 3D viewer: re-fit ÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖ toggle fullscreen (Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő "ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓŞöÓŞ╣Ó╣ÇÓŞĽÓ╣çÓŞíÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞąÓŞó")
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő screenshot fullscreen: ÓŞŤÓŞŞÓ╣łÓŞí ÔťĽ ÓŞéÓŞžÓŞ▓ÓŞąÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž Ôťô Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞĽÓ╣çÓŞíÓ╣ÇÓŞčÓŞúÓŞíÓŞĽÓŞÂÓŞçÓ╣ć Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁ margin (1.7 Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞĽÓŞ┤ÓŞö).
**ROOT:** auto-fit ÓŞúÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓ╣üÓŞäÓ╣łÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞ┤ÓŞö (ÓŞäÓŞ│ÓŞÖÓŞžÓŞô radius ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü normal viewport). Ó╣ÇÓŞéÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ fullscreen Ôćĺ container Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞŹÓ╣łÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖ/aspect Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓŞąÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞóÓŞÖ Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓ╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł re-fit Ôćĺ ÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓŞöÓŞ╣Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞŹÓ╣łÓŞĽÓŞÂÓŞç; ÓŞşÓŞşÓŞü fullscreen ÓŞüÓ╣çÓŞäÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞç radius ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç fullscreen Ôćĺ ÓŞöÓŞ╣Ó╣ÇÓŞąÓ╣çÓŞü.
**FIX:** Ó╣ÇÓŞ×ÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞí `_refitForViewport()` (rAF + setTimeout 240ms Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ë resize/model-viewer FOV settle ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ getFieldOfView) Ó╣ÇÓŞúÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞüÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞü transition: `_enterPseudo`/`_exitPseudo` (pseudo-fs) + `_onFsChange` (real FS enter+exit). Ó╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ë `_fitVisibleWorld` (axis-correct, margin 1.7) Ôćĺ ÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞĽÓ╣çÓŞíÓŞłÓŞşÓ╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁ breathing room ÓŞŚÓŞŞÓŞüÓ╣éÓŞźÓŞíÓŞö.
**VERIFY:** `node --check` Ôťô ┬Ě grep wiring 4 ÓŞłÓŞŞÓŞö (app.js:2539/2547/2553/2589). Pixel = ÓŞúÓŞşÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣őÓ╣üÓŞĽÓŞ░ iPhone (pseudo-fs reproduce Ó╣ÇÓŞëÓŞ×ÓŞ▓ÓŞ░Ó╣ÇÓŞäÓŞúÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞçÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç).

ÓŞíÓŞÁ 2 run ÓŞőÓ╣ëÓŞ│ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç ce956e3 (ÓŞşÓŞ▓ÓŞüÓŞ▓ÓŞú coalesce/stuck). FIX = empty commit `180ef20` re-trigger Ôćĺ build success. **VERIFY ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞŐÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞ¬ÓŞŞÓŞö = `curl live app.js | grep _FIT_MARGIN` (Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓ╣çÓŞÖ 2.1) Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣łÓ╣üÓŞäÓ╣ł push ÓŞ¬ÓŞ│Ó╣ÇÓŞúÓ╣çÓŞł** ÔÇö push Ôëá deployed. Ó╣ÇÓŞüÓ╣çÓŞÜÓ╣äÓŞžÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ lesson: ÓŞľÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ `gh run watch` ÓŞäÓŞĚÓŞÖ sha Ó╣ÇÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞ▓/Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓŞíÓŞÁ run Ó╣âÓŞźÓŞíÓ╣ł Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞŐÓ╣çÓŞä `gh api .../pages/builds/latest` + curl edge ÓŞüÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞÖÓŞ¬ÓŞúÓŞŞÓŞŤÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ live.

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě ÔÜá Fusion auto-commit cancelled my in-flight web build (coordination lesson)
ÓŞéÓŞôÓŞ░ Pages ÓŞüÓŞ│ÓŞąÓŞ▒ÓŞç build `91bc70b` (PCS change) Fusion lane push `3e80bfb` ("Update drawings 20:42", Ó╣üÓŞĽÓŞ░Ó╣üÓŞäÓ╣ł Drawings/manifest+project json) Ôćĺ web build ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç 91bc70b ÓŞľÓŞ╣ÓŞü **cancelled** ÓŞüÓŞąÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞäÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ + `pages/builds/latest` API ÓŞéÓŞÂÓ╣ëÓŞÖ "errored". Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣ł build ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞç `3e80bfb` (ÓŞíÓŞÁ 91bc70b Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ parent Ôćĺ Ó╣éÓŞäÓ╣ëÓŞö PCS ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜ) **success** ÓŞťÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ Actions. **LESSON: Ó╣ÇÓŞŐÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞş Actions run (`gh run list`) Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ł `pages/builds/latest` API (ÓŞúÓŞ▓ÓŞóÓŞçÓŞ▓ÓŞÖÓŞäÓŞÖÓŞąÓŞ░ÓŞúÓŞ░ÓŞÜÓŞÜ ÓŞéÓŞ▒ÓŞöÓŞüÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓ╣äÓŞöÓ╣ë); Ó╣üÓŞąÓŞ░ concurrent commit ÓŞłÓŞ▓ÓŞü lane ÓŞşÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞÖÓŞłÓŞ░ cancel web build ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞäÓ╣ëÓŞ▓ÓŞçÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣ł ÔÇö verify deploy ÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞžÓŞó `curl edge | grep <marker>` Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ ground truth Ó╣ÇÓŞ¬ÓŞíÓŞş.** ÓŞóÓŞĚÓŞÖÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž: PCS css+text + margin 2.6 ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓŞÜÓŞÖ edge ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞÜ.

### WEB ┬Ě 2026-06-24 ┬Ě 3D viewer: FIX orbit snaps model bigger (auto radius)
Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő: "ÓŞéÓŞÖÓŞ▓ÓŞöÓŞĽÓŞşÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞúÓŞ┤Ó╣łÓŞíÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞÖ OK Ó╣üÓŞĽÓ╣łÓŞ×ÓŞşÓŞäÓŞąÓŞ┤Ó╣ŐÓŞü orbit ÓŞéÓŞóÓŞ▓ÓŞóÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞŹÓ╣łÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞÁ Ó╣äÓŞíÓ╣ł OK".
**ROOT:** `_setOrbit` (gesture handler, ÓŞŚÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞç touch 1-ÓŞÖÓŞ┤Ó╣ëÓŞž + mouse left-drag) set `cameraOrbit = ╬Ş rad ¤ć rad auto`. ÓŞäÓŞ│ÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ **`auto`** = Ó╣âÓŞźÓ╣ë model-viewer reframe radius Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖ default ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞçÓŞíÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞşÓŞç (Ó╣üÓŞÖÓ╣łÓŞÖÓŞüÓŞžÓ╣łÓŞ▓ margin 2.6 ÓŞéÓŞşÓŞçÓ╣ÇÓŞúÓŞ▓) Ôćĺ Ó╣üÓŞĽÓŞ░ orbit ÓŞäÓŞúÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓ╣üÓŞúÓŞüÓŞĽÓŞ╣Ó╣ëÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓ╣ëÓŞçÓ╣âÓŞźÓŞŹÓ╣łÓŞŚÓŞ▒ÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞÁ. (Ó╣ÇÓŞŤÓ╣çÓŞÖÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞÁÓŞóÓŞžÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ë `auto`; fit paths 3 ÓŞłÓŞŞÓŞöÓ╣âÓŞŐÓ╣ë explicit `${radius}m` ÓŞşÓŞóÓŞ╣Ó╣łÓ╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž.)
**FIX:** `_setOrbit` ÓŞşÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ radius ÓŞŤÓŞ▒ÓŞłÓŞłÓŞŞÓŞÜÓŞ▒ÓŞÖ `mv.getCameraOrbit().radius` Ó╣üÓŞąÓ╣ëÓŞž pin Ó╣äÓŞžÓ╣ë (app.js:2777) Ôćĺ orbit ÓŞäÓŞçÓŞúÓŞ░ÓŞóÓŞ░ fit (2.6) / FOV-zoom ÓŞŚÓŞÁÓ╣łÓŞĽÓŞ▒Ó╣ëÓŞçÓ╣äÓŞžÓ╣ë. zoom ÓŞóÓŞ▒ÓŞçÓŞŚÓŞ│ÓŞťÓ╣łÓŞ▓ÓŞÖ FOV Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓŞíÓŞĚÓŞşÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞöÓŞ┤ÓŞí. `node --check` Ôťô ┬Ě `rad auto` Ó╣ÇÓŞźÓŞąÓŞĚÓŞş 0.
**VERIFY:** static Ôťô + curl edge. Pixel = Ó╣ÇÓŞşÓ╣ő orbit ÓŞÜÓŞÖÓ╣ÇÓŞäÓŞúÓŞĚÓ╣łÓŞşÓŞç (ÓŞĽÓ╣ëÓŞşÓŞç drag ÓŞłÓŞúÓŞ┤ÓŞç).
